instructions: Dip banana slices in spiced batter and deep-fry.

instructions: Cook drumstick leaves with dal and coconut. Temper with mustard seeds.

instructions: Cook kambu, ferment overnight, mix with curd, and serve.

recipe_ingredients: Ripe jackfruit, jaggery, ghee, cardamom
instructions: Cook jackfruit with jaggery and ghee. Stir until thick.

recipe_ingredients: Bitter gourd, tamarind, toor dal, coconut, mustard seeds
instructions: Cook bitter gourd with tamarind and dal, season with coconut and spices.

recipe_ingredients: Raw banana, green gram, coconut, green chilies
instructions: Boil banana, mash with coconut and chilies. Stir-fry lightly.

recipe_ingredients: Red rice, coconut, mustard seeds, curry leaves
instructions: Cook red rice and season with coconut and green chilies.

recipe_ingredients: Curry leaves, tamarind, sesame seeds, mustard seeds
instructions: Blend curry leaves and sesame, cook with tamarind, and temper with mustard seeds.

recipe_ingredients: Sesame seeds, jaggery, coconut
instructions: Roast sesame, grind with jaggery and shape into balls.

recipe_ingredients: Bottle gourd, moong dal, coconut, mustard seeds
instructions: Cook bottle gourd with dal and coconut, temper with mustard seeds.

recipe_ingredients: Broad beans, coconut, mustard seeds, green chilies, curry leaves
instructions: Heat oil in a pan, add mustard seeds, curry leaves, and green chilies. Add chopped broad beans and sauté for a few minutes. Cover and cook until soft, then add grated coconut and mix well before serving.

recipe_ingredients: Banana stem, garlic, pepper, salt, cumin
instructions: Chop banana stem finely and soak in water. Sauté garlic and cumin in oil, add banana stem, and cook with water until soft. Blend smoothly, season with salt and pepper, and serve hot.

recipe_ingredients: Fenugreek seeds, raw rice, coconut milk, jaggery, cardamom
instructions: Cook rice and fenugreek seeds in water until soft, then add coconut milk and let it simmer. Sweeten with jaggery, flavor with cardamom, and serve warm.

available_ingredients: Chickpeas, Green Gram, Black Urad Dal

instructions: Soak legumes overnight and boil until soft. Heat oil, add mustard seeds, curry leaves, and cooked legumes. Mix well, add coconut, and serve warm.

recipe_ingredients: Thuthuvalai leaves, tamarind, garlic, pepper, cumin
instructions: Boil tamarind water with crushed thuthuvalai leaves, garlic, pepper, and cumin. Simmer for a few minutes and serve hot with rice.

recipe_ingredients: Rice, toor dal, garlic, cumin, red chilies, turmeric
instructions: Wash rice and toor dal, cook together with garlic, cumin, turmeric, and red chilies in a pressure cooker until soft. Mix well and serve with ghee.

available_ingredients: Ragi, Jowar, Foxtail Millet, Urad Dal
recipe_ingredients: Mixed millet flours, urad dal, curry leaves, green chilies
instructions: Grind urad dal with water and mix with millet flours. Add salt, curry leaves, and green chilies. Pour batter on a tawa, cook both sides until crispy, and serve.

recipe_ingredients: Amaranth leaves, moong dal, coconut, green chilies, mustard seeds
instructions: Cook moong dal with turmeric, then add chopped amaranth leaves and let it soften. Grind coconut with green chilies, mix in, and season with mustard seeds before serving.

recipe_ingredients: Sprouted moong, grated carrot, cucumber, lemon juice, salt, pepper
instructions: Mix all ingredients, toss well, and serve fresh.

instructions: Blend all ingredients until smooth. Serve chilled.

recipe_ingredients: Quinoa, spinach, garlic, olive oil, salt, black pepper
instructions: Cook quinoa, sauté spinach in olive oil with garlic, mix, and serve warm.

recipe_ingredients: Ragi flour, almond milk, jaggery, cardamom
instructions: Cook ragi in almond milk, add jaggery and cardamom, and stir well. Serve warm.

recipe_ingredients: Chia seeds, yogurt, mixed berries, honey
instructions: Soak chia seeds in yogurt overnight, layer with berries, drizzle honey, and serve.

recipe_ingredients: Brown rice, cooked lentils, cucumber, tomato, lemon juice, olive oil
instructions: Mix cooked rice and lentils with veggies, drizzle lemon juice and olive oil.

recipe_ingredients: Mixed millet flour, almonds, dates, coconut, honey
instructions: Blend into a dough, roll into balls, and refrigerate.

recipe_ingredients: Whole wheat bread, avocado, lemon, salt, black pepper
instructions: Mash avocado, mix with lemon juice, salt, and pepper. Spread on toast.

recipe_ingredients: Barley, buttermilk, salt, coriander
instructions: Cook barley, cool it, mix with buttermilk, add salt and coriander.

recipe_ingredients: Moringa leaves, water, lemon juice, honey
instructions: Boil moringa leaves, strain, add lemon juice and honey. Serve warm.

recipe_ingredients: Grated beetroot, coconut, curd, green chilies
instructions: Steam beetroot, blend with coconut, mix with curd.

recipe_ingredients: Kodo millet, moong dal, black pepper, cumin, ginger
instructions: Cook millet and dal, season with black pepper, cumin, ginger.

recipe_ingredients: Almonds, dates, figs, sesame seeds
instructions: Blend into a dough, roll into balls, store.

recipe_ingredients: Barley water, cucumber, lemon, salt
instructions: Blend everything, serve chilled.

recipe_ingredients: Papaya, yogurt, mint leaves, honey
instructions: Blend and serve chilled.

recipe_ingredients: Broccoli, almonds, garlic, black pepper
instructions: Steam broccoli, blend with garlic and almonds, season, and serve warm.

instructions: Mix vegetables into batter, make dosas.

instructions: Sauté garlic, blend with spinach, cook with paneer.

recipe_ingredients: Cabbage, green peas, coconut, mustard seeds
instructions: Sauté all ingredients, serve.

instructions: Cook bitter gourd with tamarind, add jaggery, season.

instructions: Cook millet and dal, season with spices, and serve warm.

recipe_ingredients: Watermelon juice, mint leaves, lemon juice
instructions: Blend everything and serve chilled.

recipe_ingredients: Ridge gourd, green gram, coconut, green chilies
instructions: Sauté ridge gourd, blend with coconut and spices.

recipe_ingredients: Brown rice, fenugreek seeds, jaggery, urad dal
instructions: Ferment batter, make dosas, serve with chutney.

recipe_ingredients: Sweet potato, jaggery, coconut, cardamom
instructions: Cook sweet potato, mash with jaggery and coconut.

recipe_ingredients: Ragi flour, urad dal, fenugreek seeds
instructions: Ferment batter, steam idlis, serve with chutney.

recipe_ingredients: Cucumber, lemon juice, honey, mint leaves
instructions: Mix ingredients in water and drink fresh.

recipe_ingredients: Chickpea flour, buttermilk, curry leaves, mustard seeds
instructions: Mix chickpea flour with buttermilk, cook with spices.

recipe_ingredients: Sprouted fenugreek, lemon juice, honey
instructions: Blend ingredients and serve chilled.

recipe_ingredients: Ragi flour, milk, jaggery, cardamom
instructions: Mix ragi flour with water, boil milk separately, add ragi paste, stir, and sweeten with jaggery. Serve warm.

recipe_ingredients: Almonds, dates, milk, saffron
instructions: Soak almonds, peel, and blend with dates. Boil milk, add almond paste and saffron, stir, and serve warm.

recipe_ingredients: Cold milk, rose syrup, sugar, cardamom
instructions: Mix rose syrup and cardamom with cold milk, stir well, and chill before serving.

recipe_ingredients: Milk, saffron, pistachios, sugar
instructions: Soak saffron in warm milk, add crushed pistachios, boil for 5 minutes, and serve warm or chilled.

recipe_ingredients: Banana, chilled milk, honey, cardamom
instructions: Blend all ingredients until smooth and creamy, then serve cold.

recipe_ingredients: Ripe mango, chilled milk, cardamom, sugar
instructions: Blend mango and milk with sugar, sprinkle cardamom powder, and serve cold.

recipe_ingredients: Cocoa powder, milk, honey, vanilla extract
instructions: Blend cocoa powder with chilled milk and honey, add vanilla, and serve chilled.

recipe_ingredients: Chia seeds, milk, honey, vanilla essence
instructions: Soak chia seeds in milk overnight, add honey and vanilla, and serve chilled.

recipe_ingredients: Grated paneer, milk, sugar, nuts
instructions: Boil milk, add paneer and nuts, stir well, and simmer for 10 minutes before serving.

recipe_ingredients: Foxtail millet, jaggery, milk, cashews
instructions: Cook millet in water, add milk, stir, and sweeten with jaggery before serving.

recipe_ingredients: Rice flour, coconut milk, jaggery, cardamom
instructions: Prepare rice flour dumplings, cook in coconut milk, and sweeten with jaggery.

recipe_ingredients: Poha (flattened rice), warm milk, cardamom, nuts
instructions: Soak poha in milk, add cardamom, stir, and garnish with nuts.

recipe_ingredients: Figs, dates, milk, almonds
instructions: Soak figs and dates, blend with milk and almonds, and serve chilled.

recipe_ingredients: Cashews, milk, saffron, sugar
instructions: Blend soaked cashews into a paste, cook in milk, add saffron and sugar, and simmer.

recipe_ingredients: Pumpkin puree, milk, jaggery, nuts
instructions: Cook pumpkin puree, add milk and jaggery, and simmer until thick. Garnish with nuts.

recipe_ingredients: Ragi flour, mashed banana, milk, honey
instructions: Mix ingredients into a batter, cook on a hot pan, flip, and serve warm.

recipe_ingredients: Whole wheat flour, milk, honey, vanilla extract
instructions: Mix ingredients into a batter, cook pancakes on a skillet, and serve warm.

recipe_ingredients: Chikoo (sapota), milk, jaggery, cardamom
instructions: Blend chikoo with milk and jaggery, add cardamom, and serve chilled.

recipe_ingredients: Tender coconut, milk, honey, ice cubes
instructions: Blend chikoo with milk and jaggery, add cardamom, and serve chilled.

recipe_ingredients: Chicken, black pepper, garlic, onions, curry leaves, ginger, turmeric, green chilies
instructions: Marinate chicken with turmeric, salt, and ginger-garlic paste for 30 minutes. Heat oil, sauté onions, garlic, and curry leaves. Add marinated chicken and cook until half done. Add black pepper, green chilies, and garam masala. Stir well and cook until the chicken is tender. Garnish with fresh coriander and serve hot.
column5: Marinate chicken with turmeric, salt, and ginger-garlic paste for 30 minutes. Heat oil, sauté onions, garlic, and curry leaves. Add marinated chicken and cook until half done. Add black pepper, green chilies, and garam masala. Stir well and cook until the chicken is tender. Garnish with fresh coriander and serve hot.

recipe_ingredients: Mutton, dry spices, yogurt, curry leaves, onions, garlic, fennel seeds
instructions: Marinate mutton with yogurt, turmeric, and chili powder for 1 hour. Heat oil, add fennel seeds, onions, and garlic, sauté until golden. Add marinated mutton and cook until brown. Add little water and slow cook until mutton becomes tender. Stir-fry until dry and serve hot with rice or parotta.

recipe_ingredients: Fish, tamarind, onions, tomatoes, mustard seeds, garlic, red chili powder, curry leave
instructions: Soak tamarind in warm water and extract pulp. Heat oil, add mustard seeds, onions, and garlic, sauté until golden. Add tomatoes, chili powder, turmeric, and tamarind extract. Simmer for 10 minutes, then add fish pieces. Cook on medium heat for 10 minutes until fish is done. Garnish with curry leaves and serve with rice.

recipe_ingredients: Prawns, coconut paste, onions, tomatoes, curry leaves, mustard seeds, green chilies
instructions: Heat oil, add mustard seeds, onions, and curry leaves, sauté until soft. Add tomatoes, green chilies, and cook until mushy. Add prawns and mix well with spices. Cook for 5-7 minutes until prawns turn pink and tender. Stir in coconut paste and simmer for a few minutes. Serve hot with steamed rice or chapati.

recipe_ingredients: Crab, black pepper, ginger, tomatoes, coriander, tamarind, garlic
instructions: Clean the crabs and cut them into halves. Heat oil, add crushed pepper, ginger, and garlic, sauté well. Add chopped tomatoes and tamarind extract. Pour water and bring to a boil. Add crab pieces and simmer for 15 minutes until flavors infuse. Garnish with coriander leaves and serve hot as soup or with rice.

recipe_ingredients: Dry fish, onions, tamarind, tomatoes, garlic, red chili powder
instructions: Soak dry fish in warm water for 10 minutes to remove excess salt. Heat oil, add mustard seeds, onions, garlic, and curry leaves, sauté well. Add chopped tomatoes and chili powder. Pour in tamarind extract and bring to a boil. Add soaked dry fish and cook for 15 minutes. Serve hot with rice and appalam.

recipe_ingredients: Eggs, onions, tomatoes, garam masala, green chilies, turmeric
instructions: Boil eggs, peel and make small cuts on them. Heat oil, sauté onions and green chilies until golden. Add tomatoes, turmeric, garam masala, and mix well. Add boiled eggs and coat them with masala. Cook for 5 minutes and garnish with coriander. Serve with chapati or rice.

recipe_ingredients: Eggs, black pepper, milk, garlic, curry leaves, turmeric
instructions: Boil milk with crushed garlic and curry leaves. Beat eggs and slowly add them to the boiling milk while stirring continuously. Add black pepper and a pinch of turmeric. Simmer for 5 minutes and serve hot.

recipe_ingredients: Mutton bones, garlic, pepper, shallots, coriander leaves
instructions: Heat oil, add crushed garlic, shallots, and pepper, sauté well. Add mutton bones and fry for 2 minutes. Pour in water and simmer for 1 hour. Add salt and coriander leaves. Strain and serve hot.

recipe_ingredients: Fish, turmeric, red chili powder, curry leaves, lemon juice
instructions: Clean fish and marinate with turmeric, chili powder, and salt for 30 minutes. Heat oil and shallow fry the fish until crispy. Garnish with curry leaves and lemon wedges.

recipe_ingredients: Chicken, butter, tomato puree, cream, cashews, garam masala
instructions: Marinate chicken with yogurt, turmeric, and chili powder. Grill or pan-fry the chicken. In a separate pan, cook tomato puree with butter, cashews, and garam masala. Add grilled chicken and simmer. Stir in cream and serve hot.

recipe_ingredients: Shredded parotta, mutton curry, eggs, onion
instructions: Toss shredded parotta pieces in mutton curry with eggs and onions. Stir-fry until well combined. Serve hot.

recipe_ingredients: Fish, banana leaf, coconut, red chili
instructions: Marinate fish in spices, wrap in banana leaf, and grill until cooked through.

recipe_ingredients: Rice flour, prawns, coconut milk
instructions: steam rice noodles,serve with prawn coconut gravy

recipe_ingredients: Crab, tamarind, garlic, pepper
instructions: Cook crab with tamarind, garlic, and pepper masala until tender.

recipe_ingredients: Boneless chicken, yogurt, garlic, cumin, paprika, pita bread, lemon juice, olive oil, black pepper
instructions: 1. Marinate boneless chicken with yogurt, garlic, cumin, paprika, lemon juice, salt, and black pepper for at least 2 hours. 2. Heat a pan with olive oil and grill the marinated chicken until cooked through. 3. Slice the chicken into thin strips. 4. Warm pita bread and add garlic sauce, lettuce, tomatoes, and onion slices. 5. Add the sliced chicken, roll tightly, and serve with hummus or yogurt sauce.

recipe_ingredients: Mutton, ghee, red chili paste, curry leaves, ginger, garlic, garam masala, turmeric
instructions: 1. Marinate mutton with turmeric, red chili paste, ginger-garlic paste, and salt for 1 hour. 2. Heat ghee in a pan, add curry leaves, and sauté until aromatic. 3. Add marinated mutton and cook on medium flame for 10 minutes. 4. Pour water, cover, and simmer for 40-45 minutes until mutton becomes tender. 5. Open the lid, roast the mutton in remaining ghee, and cook until it turns dry. 6. Serve hot with rice or roti.

recipe_ingredients: Mutton, coconut paste, shallots, dry red chili, turmeric, black pepper
instructions: 1. Marinate mutton with turmeric and salt for 30 minutes. 2. Heat oil, add shallots, dry red chili, and sauté until fragrant. 3. Add marinated mutton, cover, and cook on low heat for 40 minutes, stirring occasionally. 4. Stir in coconut paste, cook until dry and crispy. 5. Serve hot with rice or dosa.

recipe_ingredients: Boneless chicken, yogurt, lemon juice, red chili powder, turmeric, garam masala, ginger-garlic paste
instructions: 1. Marinate chicken with yogurt, lemon juice, chili powder, turmeric, garam masala, and ginger-garlic paste for 2 hours. 2. Skewer the chicken and grill in an oven or on a tawa until golden brown. 3. Serve hot with mint chutney.

recipe_ingredients: Chicken breast, black pepper, lemon juice, garlic, olive oil
instructions: 1. Marinate chicken with lemon juice, crushed black pepper, garlic, and salt for 30 minutes. 2. Heat oil in a pan, grill chicken on medium flame until cooked through. 3. Serve with steamed vegetables.

recipe_ingredients: Basmati rice, chicken, yogurt, saffron, onions, tomatoes, garam masala
instructions: 1. Marinate chicken with yogurt, turmeric, and garam masala for 1 hour. 2. Cook onions and tomatoes in ghee, add chicken, and cook until tender. 3. Layer half-cooked basmati rice over chicken, sprinkle saffron water, and cook on dum for 20 minutes. 4. Serve hot with raita.

recipe_ingredients: Chicken, tamarind, curry leaves, onions, tomatoes, dry red chilies
instructions: 1. Heat oil, add dry red chilies and curry leaves. 2. Sauté onions and tomatoes, add tamarind extract and cook well. 3. Add chicken pieces and simmer for 30 minutes. 4. Serve with rice or chapati.

recipe_ingredients: Chicken, green chilies, curry leaves, mustard seeds, black pepper
instructions: 1. Marinate chicken with black pepper, turmeric, and salt. 2. Heat oil, add mustard seeds, green chilies, and curry leaves. 3. Add chicken and cook until crispy and golden brown. 4. Serve with hot rice.

recipe_ingredients: Boneless chicken, curd, ginger-garlic paste, red chili paste, curry leaves
instructions: 1. Marinate chicken with curd, red chili paste, and ginger-garlic paste for 1 hour. 2. Deep fry until crispy. 3. Toss with fried curry leaves and serve hot.

recipe_ingredients: Chicken, cashew paste, tomatoes, garam masala, butter
instructions: 1. Heat butter, add chopped onions and cook until golden. 2. Add tomato puree, spices, and cook until oil separates. 3. Stir in cashew paste and mix well. 4. Add chicken, cook until soft and tender. 5. Serve hot with naan or rice.

recipe_ingredients: Chicken drumsticks, corn flour, egg, black pepper, breadcrumbs
instructions: 1. Marinate chicken with salt, black pepper, and egg. 2. Coat in corn flour and breadcrumbs. 3. Deep fry until crispy and golden. 4. Serve hot with ketchup or mayo.

recipe_ingredients: Chicken, soy sauce, bell peppers, red chilies, sesame seeds
instructions: 1. Marinate chicken in soy sauce and chili paste for 30 minutes. 2. Stir-fry in a wok with bell peppers and sesame seeds. 3. Serve with fried rice.

recipe_ingredients: Chicken, soy sauce, oyster sauce, basil leaves, garlic
instructions: 1. Heat oil, sauté garlic until fragrant. 2. Add chicken and stir-fry. 3. Pour soy sauce and oyster sauce, cook for 5 minutes. 4. Add fresh basil leaves, mix well. 5. Serve with steamed rice.

recipe_ingredients: Chicken, bell peppers, onions, tomatoes, ginger, garam masala
instructions: 1. Heat oil, sauté onions, ginger, and tomatoes. 2. Add chicken and cook until tender. 3. Toss in bell peppers and garam masala. 4. Serve hot with naan or roti.

recipe_ingredients: Chicken, honey, garlic, soy sauce, red chili flakes
instructions: 1. Heat oil, sauté minced garlic. 2. Add chicken and cook until golden. 3. Stir in honey, soy sauce, and chili flakes. 4. Cook until thick and glossy. 5. Serve with rice.

recipe_ingredients: Mutton, dry red chilies, coconut paste, fennel seeds, curry leaves
instructions: 1. Heat oil, add fennel seeds, curry leaves, and dry chilies. 2. Add onions, cook until golden brown. 3. Stir in ginger-garlic paste, tomatoes, and mutton. 4. Add coconut paste and cook for 45 minutes. 5. Serve hot with dosa or idli.

recipe_ingredients: Mutton, sprouted moong dal, coconut milk, garam masala
instructions: 1. Pressure cook mutton with sprouted moong dal. 2. Add coconut milk, simmer for 10 minutes. 3. Serve with dosa or idiyappam.

recipe_ingredients: Mutton, beetroot, black pepper, curry leaves
instructions: 1. Heat oil, fry curry leaves and black pepper. 2. Add mutton and cook until brown. 3. Stir in grated beetroot and sauté well. 4. Serve as a side dish.

recipe_ingredients: Mutton, ridge gourd, tomatoes, onions, garam masala
instructions: 1. Cook mutton until tender. 2. Add ridge gourd slices and cook for 10 minutes. 3. Stir in garam masala, serve with rice.

recipe_ingredients: Boneless chicken, black pepper, garlic, ginger, coriander leaves

recipe_ingredients: Tomato, Curd, Mustard Seeds, Curry Leaves, Red Chilies
instructions: 1. Sauté mustard seeds, curry leaves, and red chilies in oil. 2. Add chopped tomatoes and cook until soft. 3. Add curd, salt, and cook for 5 minutes. 4. Serve with dosa or idli.

recipe_ingredients: Bread, Tomatoes, Olive Oil, Garlic, Basil, Salt, Pepper
instructions: Preheat the oven to 200°C (400°F). Slice the bread into thick pieces and arrange them on a baking sheet. Drizzle with olive oil and toast in the oven until golden brown. While the bread is toasting, chop fresh tomatoes and mix with olive oil, salt, pepper, and finely chopped basil. Rub a peeled garlic clove over the toasted bread for added flavor. Top each slice with the tomato mixture and garnish with extra basil. Serve immediately.

recipe_ingredients: Pasta, Butter, Parmesan Cheese, Black Pepper, Salt
instructions: Boil pasta in a pot of salted water until it is al dente. Reserve a cup of the pasta water before draining. In a large skillet, melt butter over medium heat and add freshly ground black pepper. Toast the pepper lightly to release its aroma. Add the cooked pasta and a small amount of the reserved pasta water to the skillet. Gradually sprinkle grated Parmesan cheese while stirring vigorously to create a creamy sauce. Add more pasta water if needed to reach the desired consistency. Serve immediately with additional Parmesan and black pepper on top.

recipe_ingredients: Arborio Rice, Saffron Threads, Parmesan, White Wine, Butter, Onion, Chicken Broth
instructions: Heat the chicken broth in a separate pot and keep it warm. In a large pan, melt butter and sauté finely chopped onions until translucent. Add the Arborio rice and toast it slightly until the edges become transparent. Pour in the white wine and stir until it is fully absorbed. Gradually add a ladle of warm broth at a time, stirring constantly. Continue adding broth and stirring until the rice becomes creamy and cooked through. Dissolve saffron in a small amount of warm water and add it to the risotto, giving it a vibrant golden color. Stir in grated Parmesan cheese and a final touch of butter for added richness. Serve hot.

available_ingredients: Pizza Dough, Tomato Sauce, Mozzarella, Basil
recipe_ingredients: Pizza Dough, Tomato Sauce, Fresh Mozzarella, Basil, Olive Oil, Salt
instructions: Preheat the oven to 250°C (480°F) with a pizza stone or baking sheet inside. Roll out the pizza dough on a floured surface until it reaches your desired thickness. Spread a thin layer of tomato sauce over the dough, leaving a small border for the crust. Tear fresh mozzarella into chunks and scatter it across the sauce. Place a few fresh basil leaves on top and drizzle with olive oil. Carefully transfer the pizza onto the hot baking sheet or stone and bake until the crust is golden and the cheese is bubbling. Remove from the oven and serve immediately.

available_ingredients: Basil, Pine Nuts, Parmesan, Olive Oil, Garlic
recipe_ingredients: Pasta, Fresh Basil, Pine Nuts, Parmesan, Olive Oil, Garlic, Salt, Pepper
instructions: Cook the pasta in a large pot of salted boiling water until al dente. Reserve a small amount of pasta water. In a food processor, combine fresh basil, pine nuts, garlic, and grated Parmesan cheese. Gradually add olive oil while blending until the mixture becomes a smooth pesto sauce. Adjust seasoning with salt and pepper. Toss the cooked pasta with the pesto sauce, adding a splash of pasta water if needed for a smoother consistency. Serve with extra Parmesan and fresh basil leaves for garnish.

recipe_ingredients: Spaghetti, Eggs, Pancetta, Parmesan, Black Pepper, Salt
instructions: Boil spaghetti in salted water until al dente. In a bowl, whisk eggs with grated Parmesan and black pepper. Cook pancetta in a skillet until crispy. Drain the pasta, reserving some pasta water. Combine the pasta with the pancetta, then remove the pan from the heat. Quickly stir in the egg mixture, using the residual heat to create a creamy sauce. Add reserved pasta water if necessary. Serve with additional Parmesan and pepper.

available_ingredients: Arborio Rice, Mushrooms, Garlic, White Wine, Parmesan
recipe_ingredients: Arborio Rice, Fresh Mushrooms, Garlic, Onion, White Wine, Parmesan, Butter, Vegetable Broth, Olive Oil
instructions: Heat vegetable broth in a pot. In a large pan, sauté garlic and chopped onions in olive oil until fragrant. Add sliced mushrooms and cook until tender. Stir in Arborio rice and toast it lightly. Pour in white wine and cook until it evaporates. Gradually add warm broth one ladle at a time, stirring constantly until the rice is creamy and cooked through. Finish with Parmesan and butter for a rich, velvety texture. Serve hot.

recipe_ingredients: All-Purpose Flour, Eggs, Olive Oil, Salt
instructions: On a clean surface, create a mound of flour and make a well in the center. Crack the eggs into the well and add olive oil and a pinch of salt. Gradually mix the flour into the eggs using a fork, then knead the dough until smooth and elastic. Let it rest for 30 minutes. Roll out the dough and cut it into desired shapes for fettuccine, tagliatelle, or lasagna. Cook in boiling salted water until al dente. Serve with your favorite sauce.

available_ingredients: Sushi Rice, Nori, Fish, Vegetables, Soy Sauce, Wasabi
recipe_ingredients: Sushi Rice, Nori (Seaweed), Fresh Fish (Salmon, Tuna), Cucumber, Avocado, Soy Sauce, Wasabi, Rice Vinegar
instructions: Rinse the sushi rice thoroughly and cook it in a rice cooker. Mix rice vinegar, sugar, and salt, and stir it into the cooked rice. Place a sheet of nori on a bamboo mat, spread a thin layer of rice over it, leaving a small border. Add thin slices of fish and vegetables. Roll tightly using the mat. Slice into bite-sized pieces and serve with soy sauce, wasabi, and pickled ginger.

available_ingredients: Rice, Eggs, Soy Sauce, Green Onions, Carrots, Peas
recipe_ingredients: Cooked Rice, Eggs, Soy Sauce, Green Onions, Carrots, Peas, Oil, Garlic, Salt, Pepper
instructions: Heat oil in a pan and scramble the eggs. Remove the eggs and set aside. In the same pan, sauté garlic, chopped green onions, carrots, and peas until tender. Add the cooked rice and stir-fry. Pour soy sauce over the rice and stir well. Add the scrambled eggs back into the pan and combine. Season with salt and pepper to taste. Garnish with additional green onions.

available_ingredients: Tofu, Dashi, Miso Paste, Seaweed, Green Onions
recipe_ingredients: tofu, Miso Paste, Dashi (Japanese Stock), Wakame (Seaweed), Green Onions
instructions: Heat dashi stock in a pot until it simmers. Add wakame and let it rehydrate. Cube the tofu and gently add it to the soup. In a separate bowl, dissolve miso paste with a bit of the hot stock, then add it back to the pot. Stir well without boiling. Garnish with chopped green onions before serving.

available_ingredients: Rice, Chicken, Eggs, Onions, Dashi, Soy Sauce, Mirin
recipe_ingredients: Cooked Rice, Chicken Thighs, Eggs, Onions, Dashi, Soy Sauce, Mirin, Sugar
instructions: Slice the chicken and onions. Heat dashi, soy sauce, mirin, and sugar in a pan. Add the onions and cook until soft. Place the chicken on top and cook until tender. Beat the eggs lightly and pour them over the chicken. Cover and cook until the eggs are just set. Serve over a bowl of hot rice, garnished with green onions.

available_ingredients: Rice, Raw Fish, Nori, Wasabi, Soy Sauce
recipe_ingredients: Sushi Rice, Assorted Raw Fish (Salmon, Tuna, Shrimp), Nori, Avocado, Cucumber, Wasabi, Soy Sauce
instructions: Prepare sushi rice with rice vinegar, sugar, and salt. Spread the rice in a bowl. Slice the raw fish into thin pieces. Arrange the fish, avocado, cucumber, and other toppings over the rice. Garnish with shredded nori. Serve with soy sauce and wasabi.

available_ingredients: Udon Noodles, Dashi, Soy Sauce, Green Onions, Tempura
recipe_ingredients: Udon Noodles, Dashi Broth, Soy Sauce, Mirin, Tempura (Optional), Green Onions
instructions: Boil the udon noodles according to package instructions. Heat dashi broth with soy sauce and mirin in a pot. Drain the noodles and add them to the broth. Top with chopped green onions and optional tempura for extra crunch. Serve hot.

available_ingredients: Rice, Coconut, Vegetables, Green Chilies, Curry Leaves
recipe_ingredients: Mixed Vegetables (Carrot, Beans, Yam, Raw Banana), Grated Coconut, Curd, Green Chilies, Curry Leaves, Coconut Oil, Turmeric, Mustard
instructions: Boil the vegetables with turmeric and salt until tender. Grind grated coconut with green chilies and curd to make a coarse paste. Add the paste to the boiled vegetables and mix gently. Heat coconut oil in a pan, add mustard seeds and curry leaves for tempering. Pour over the Avial and serve.

recipe_ingredients: Rice Flour, Coconut Milk, Jaggery, Cardamom, Cashews, Raisins, Ghee
instructions: Mix rice flour with water to make a smooth dough. Spread thin layers of the dough on banana leaves, fill with a mixture of jaggery and coconut, and fold. Steam cook the filled leaves to prepare Ada. In a pot, boil coconut milk and add the Ada pieces. Stir in jaggery syrup and cardamom powder. Garnish with fried cashews and raisins. Serve warm.

available_ingredients: Raw Plantains, Coconut, Turmeric, Green Chilies, Mustard
recipe_ingredients: Raw Plantains, Coconut Oil, Mustard Seeds, Turmeric, Curry Leaves, Green Chilies
instructions: Peel and cut plantains into thin strips. Heat coconut oil in a pan, add mustard seeds, curry leaves, and green chilies. Add the plantains and sprinkle turmeric and salt. Cook on medium heat until the plantains turn golden and crispy. Serve as a side dish with rice.

recipe_ingredients: Rice Flour, Grated Coconut, Salt, Water, Black Chana, Coconut, Onion, Green Chilies, Curry Leaves
instructions: Mix rice flour with water and salt to form a crumbly texture. Layer rice flour and grated coconut alternately in a Puttu maker and steam until cooked. For Kadala Curry, cook soaked black chana with turmeric and salt. Make a coconut-based masala with spices, onion, and tomatoes. Mix with the cooked chana and simmer. Serve hot with Puttu.

available_ingredients: Rice, Coconut, Yogurt, Green Chilies, Mustard Seeds
recipe_ingredients: Buttermilk, Coconut, Cumin, Green Chilies, Turmeric, Curry Leaves, Mustard Seeds, Red Chilies
instructions: Grind coconut, cumin, and green chilies to a paste. Mix with buttermilk and turmeric. Heat this mixture gently, stirring continuously. Prepare tempering with mustard seeds, curry leaves, and dried red chilies. Pour over the Pulissery and serve with rice.

recipe_ingredients: Rice Flour, Jaggery, Grated Coconut, Banana, Cardamom, Ghee, Baking Soda
instructions: Mash the banana and mix it with rice flour, jaggery syrup, grated coconut, and cardamom powder. Add a pinch of baking soda for fluffiness. Heat a special Unniyappam pan with oil or ghee. Pour batter into the molds and fry until golden brown on both sides. Serve as a snack or dessert.

available_ingredients: Raw Banana, Coconut, Curry Leaves, Turmeric
recipe_ingredients: Raw Banana (Nendran), Coconut Oil, Turmeric, Salt, Red Chili Powder
instructions: Peel the raw banana and slice it thinly. Soak the slices in water with turmeric and salt. Drain and dry the slices. Heat coconut oil in a pan and fry the banana slices until crispy. Sprinkle red chili powder and salt while frying. Serve as a snack or side dish.

available_ingredients: Rice, Yogurt, Ginger, Green Chilies, Curry Leaves
recipe_ingredients: Yogurt, Coconut, Cumin Seeds, Green Chilies, Curry Leaves, Turmeric, Mustard Seeds, Garlic
instructions: Beat the yogurt and mix with turmeric and salt. Grind coconut, cumin seeds, and green chilies to a paste. Add this paste to the yogurt mixture. Heat coconut oil, add mustard seeds, curry leaves, garlic, and dry red chilies. Pour the tempered spices over the curry and gently heat without boiling. Serve with rice.

available_ingredients: Toor Dal, Tamarind, Tomatoes, Mustard Seeds
recipe_ingredients: p Toor Dal, Tamarind, Tomatoes, Green Chilies, Curry Leaves, Mustard Seeds, Turmeric, Red Chilies
instructions: Cook toor dal until soft. Extract tamarind juice. Heat oil in a pot, add mustard seeds, red chilies, and curry leaves. Add chopped tomatoes and green chilies. Pour in the tamarind juice, add turmeric, and salt. Mix in the cooked dal and simmer. Garnish with coriander and serve with rice.

recipe_ingredients: Baby Eggplants, Tamarind, Jaggery, Coconut, Peanuts, Mustard Seeds, Curry Leaves
instructions: Slit the eggplants and keep the stems intact. Prepare a stuffing with roasted coconut, peanuts, tamarind, and jaggery. Fill the eggplants with the mixture. Heat oil in a pan, add mustard seeds and curry leaves. Place the stuffed eggplants in the pan, cover, and cook on low heat until tender. Serve with rice.

available_ingredients: Chicken, Red Chilies, Curry Leaves, Ginger-Garlic Paste
recipe_ingredients: Chicken, Onions, Tomatoes, Ginger-Garlic Paste, Red Chili Powder, Turmeric, Curry Leaves
instructions: Heat oil in a pot, add onions and sauté until golden brown. Add ginger-garlic paste and cook until fragrant. Add chopped tomatoes, red chili powder, turmeric, and salt. Cook until the oil separates. Add chicken pieces and cook on medium heat. Garnish with coriander leaves and serve hot.

recipe_ingredients: Spinach, Toor Dal, Green Chilies, Tamarind, Mustard Seeds, Curry Leaves, Garlic
instructions: Cook toor dal until soft. Add washed spinach and green chilies. Extract tamarind juice and add to the dal. Heat oil in a small pan, add mustard seeds, garlic, and curry leaves. Pour the tempering into the dal. Mix well and serve with rice and ghee.

recipe_ingredients: Rice Flour, Jaggery, Cardamom Powder, Ghee
instructions: Prepare thin rice sheets using rice flour batter on a flat pan. Brush each sheet with ghee and sprinkle jaggery and cardamom powder. Roll or fold the sheets to form delicate layers. Serve as a traditional sweet.

recipe_ingredients: Green Gram (Moong Dal), Jaggery, Coconut Milk, Cardamom, Cashews, Raisins, Ghee
instructions: Roast moong dal until golden brown and cook it with water until soft. Add jaggery syrup and cook on low heat. Stir in thick coconut milk and cardamom powder. Fry cashews and raisins in ghee and add them to the payasam. Serve warm.

available_ingredients: Ridge Gourd, Lentils, Mustard Seeds, Turmeric
recipe_ingredients: Ridge Gourd, Toor Dal, Green Chilies, Tamarind, Mustard Seeds, Curry Leaves, Garlic
instructions: Cook toor dal until soft. Peel and chop ridge gourd. Add to the dal along with green chilies and tamarind extract. Simmer until the ridge gourd is tender. Prepare a tempering with mustard seeds, garlic, and curry leaves. Pour over the dal and serve with rice.

recipe_ingredients: Black Gram (Urad Dal), Rice, Fenugreek Seeds, Salt
instructions: Soak rice and urad dal with fenugreek seeds overnight. Grind into a smooth batter and ferment for 8 hours. Heat a dosa tawa, pour a ladle of batter, and spread it thin. Cook until crisp and golden. Serve with chutney and sambar.

available_ingredients: Rice, Split Pigeon Peas, Ghee, Mustard Seeds, Curry Leaves
recipe_ingredients: Toor Dal, Rice, Ghee, Turmeric, Salt, Mustard Seeds, Curry Leaves, Green Chilies
instructions: Cook toor dal with turmeric and salt. Mash it well. Cook rice separately. Heat ghee in a pan, add mustard seeds, curry leaves, and green chilies for tempering. Pour the tempering over the dal. Serve with rice and ghee.

available_ingredients: Flattened Rice, Onions, Potatoes, Mustard Seeds, Turmeric
recipe_ingredients: Poha, Onions, Green Chilies, Mustard Seeds, Turmeric, Curry Leaves, Lemon, Coriander
instructions: Rinse poha and drain excess water. Heat oil in a pan, add mustard seeds, curry leaves, and green chilies. Add chopped onions and sauté. Add turmeric and poha. Mix well and cook for a few minutes. Garnish with lemon juice and coriander leaves. Serve hot.

available_ingredients: Chickpea Flour, Yogurt, Garlic, Mustard Seeds, Curry Leaves
recipe_ingredients: Yogurt, Gram Flour, Garlic, Curry Leaves, Mustard Seeds, Green Chilies, Turmeric
instructions: Whisk yogurt and gram flour together with water. Heat oil in a pan, add mustard seeds, curry leaves, garlic, and green chilies. Add turmeric and pour in the yogurt mixture. Simmer until thickened. Serve with rice.

available_ingredients: Green Peas, Paneer, Tomatoes, Onions, Spices
recipe_ingredients: Paneer, Onions, Tomatoes, Green Peas, Green Chilies, Ginger, Garam Masala, Turmeric
instructions: Crumble paneer and keep it aside. Heat oil in a pan, add cumin seeds, onions, and green chilies. Sauté until golden. Add chopped tomatoes and spices. Add green peas and cook. Finally, add crumbled paneer, mix well, and garnish with coriander. Serve with roti or bread.

available_ingredients: Whole Wheat Flour, Jaggery, Ghee, Poppy Seeds
recipe_ingredients: Rice Flour, Jaggery, Coconut, Cardamom Powder, Ghee, Poppy Seeds
instructions: Prepare a filling by mixing grated coconut, jaggery, and cardamom powder. Make a dough with rice flour and water. Form small balls, flatten, and fill with the coconut mixture. Shape them into modaks. Steam for 15-20 minutes. Serve with ghee.

recipe_ingredients: Wheat Flour, Jowar Flour, Salt, Water
instructions: Mix flour, salt, and water to make a firm dough. Divide it into balls and roll them into thick, round discs. Cook on a tawa until both sides are golden brown. Serve with vegetables or chutney.

recipe_ingredients: Rice, Mixed Vegetables, Ginger-Garlic Paste, Garam Masala, Mustard Seeds, Curry Leaves
instructions: Cook rice with vegetables. Heat oil, add mustard seeds, curry leaves, and ginger-garlic paste. Add spices and mix with the cooked rice. Garnish with coriander leaves and serve hot.

available_ingredients: Gram Flour, Yogurt, Curry Leaves, Mustard Seeds
recipe_ingredients: Gram Flour, Yogurt, Curry Leaves, Mustard Seeds, Green Chilies, Turmeric, Garlic
instructions: Mix gram flour with water, turmeric, and salt to form a paste. Heat oil in a pan, add mustard seeds, curry leaves, and garlic. Add the gram flour mixture and cook until thickened. Serve with bhakri and chutney.

available_ingredients: Gram Flour, Curd, Mustard Seeds, Curry Leaves
recipe_ingredients: Gram Flour (Besan), Yogurt, Mustard Seeds, Turmeric, Red Chili Powder, Garam Masala, Coriander
instructions: Mix gram flour with salt, chili powder, turmeric, and yogurt to form a dough. Roll into cylindrical shapes and boil them. Cut into pieces. Prepare a yogurt-based curry with mustard seeds, red chili powder, and turmeric. Add the boiled gatte and cook for a few minutes. Serve with roti or rice.

recipe_ingredients: Wheat Flour, Ghee, Jaggery, Toor Dal, Moong Dal, Masoor Dal, Garlic, Onions, Spices
instructions: Knead wheat flour with ghee and water to form stiff dough. Shape into round balls and bake until golden brown. Cook a mix of lentils with garlic, onions, and spices for the dal. Prepare churma by crushing baked baatis and mixing with ghee and jaggery. Serve together.

available_ingredients: Green Gram Flour, Curd, Mustard Seeds
recipe_ingredients: Gram Flour, Yogurt, Mustard Seeds, Turmeric, Red Chilies, Curry Leaves, Fenugreek Seeds
instructions: Whisk yogurt with gram flour and water. Heat oil in a pan, add mustard seeds, fenugreek seeds, red chilies, and curry leaves. Add turmeric and then pour the yogurt mixture. Simmer until thickened. Serve with rice.

recipe_ingredients: All-Purpose Flour, Sugar, Milk, Ghee, Cardamom Powder, Saffron, Almonds
instructions: Mix flour, ghee, and milk to make a smooth batter. Heat ghee in a deep pan, pour the batter in a circular motion to form a honeycomb-like texture. Fry until golden brown. Prepare sugar syrup and soak the ghevar. Garnish with almonds and saffron. Serve chilled.

recipe_ingredients: b Ladyfinger (Bhindi), Gram Flour, Yogurt, Mustard Seeds, Turmeric, Red Chili Powder, Cumin Seeds
instructions: Wash and slit the ladyfinger. Mix gram flour, yogurt, and spices. Heat oil in a pan, add mustard seeds and cumin seeds. Add the bhindi and cook until tender. Coat with the gram flour mixture and sauté until golden brown. Serve with chapati.

recipe_ingredients: Moong Dal, Ghee, Sugar, Cardamom Powder, Almonds, Cashews, Milk
instructions: Soak and grind moong dal into a paste. Heat ghee in a pan, cook the paste until golden brown. Add milk, sugar, and cardamom powder. Stir until the mixture thickens. Garnish with almonds and cashews. Serve warm.

recipe_ingredients: Bajra Flour, Salt, Water, Garlic, Red Chilies, Mustard Oil
instructions: Knead bajra flour with water and salt. Form into rotis and cook on a tawa. For chutney, grind garlic and red chilies with salt and mustard oil. Serve the roti with chutney and ghee.

recipe_ingredients: Eggs, Heavy Cream, Milk, Gruyère Cheese, Bacon, Onions, Salt, Pepper, Pie Crust
instructions: Preheat oven to 180°C. Cook bacon and onions until golden. In a bowl, whisk eggs, cream, milk, salt, and pepper. Place pie crust in a tart pan. Spread bacon and onions on the crust, pour the egg mixture, and top with cheese. Bake for 35-40 minutes. Let it cool slightly before serving.

recipe_ingredients: Beef Chuck, Red Wine, Carrots, Onions, Garlic, Thyme, Bay Leaves, Mushrooms, Bacon, Flour
instructions: Cut the beef into chunks. Brown the beef and bacon in a pot. Add onions, garlic, and carrots. Sprinkle flour to coat, then add red wine and broth. Add thyme and bay leaves. Simmer for 3 hours. Serve with crusty bread or mashed potatoes.

recipe_ingredients: Potatoes, Heavy Cream, Garlic, Gruyère Cheese, Nutmeg, Butter, Salt, Pepper
instructions: Preheat oven to 180°C. Slice potatoes thinly. Rub a baking dish with garlic and butter. Layer potatoes, adding cream, cheese, nutmeg, salt, and pepper. Repeat until full. Bake for 1 hour until golden and bubbly. Serve warm.

recipe_ingredients: Heavy Cream, Egg Yolks, Sugar, Vanilla Beans, Brown Sugar
instructions: Preheat oven to 150°C. Heat cream with vanilla. In a bowl, whisk egg yolks and sugar. Gradually add warm cream. Pour the mixture into ramekins and bake in a water bath for 40 minutes. Chill for 2 hours, sprinkle brown sugar on top, and caramelize using a torch.

recipe_ingredients: Onions, Butter, Beef Broth, White Wine, Baguette, Gruyère Cheese, Thyme, Bay Leaves
instructions: Slice onions and sauté in butter until caramelized. Add white wine to deglaze the pan. Pour in beef broth, add thyme and bay leaves, and simmer. Toast baguette slices. Pour the soup into bowls, add the bread slices on top, and sprinkle with cheese. Broil until golden.

recipe_ingredients: Potatoes, Flour, Eggs, Salt, Nutmeg, Butter
instructions: Boil and mash potatoes. Mix with flour, eggs, salt, and nutmeg. Form into dumplings and boil in salted water until they float. Serve with gravy or alongside roasted meat.

recipe_ingredients: Red Cabbage, Onions, Apples, Vinegar, Sugar, Bay Leaves, Cloves, Salt
instructions: Shred the cabbage and sauté onions in butter. Add cabbage, apples, vinegar, sugar, and spices. Simmer for 1 hour until tender. Serve as a side dish.

recipe_ingredients: Pork Shoulder, Onions, Garlic, Mustard, Caraway Seeds, Beer, Sauerkraut
instructions: Season pork with mustard, salt, and caraway seeds. Roast in the oven with onions and garlic. Pour beer over it and roast until tender. Serve with sauerkraut and potatoes.

recipe_ingredients: Thin Slices of Beef, Mustard, Onions, Bacon, Pickles, Beef Broth, Red Wine
instructions: Spread mustard on the beef slices, top with bacon, onions, and pickles. Roll and secure with toothpicks. Sear the rolls in a pan, then simmer with broth and wine until tender. Serve with gravy.

recipe_ingredients: c Bratwurst, Curry Powder, Ketchup, Vinegar, Sugar, Onions, Oil
instructions: Grill or fry the sausages. For the sauce, sauté onions, add ketchup, vinegar, sugar, and curry powder. Slice sausages and pour the sauce over them. Serve with fries.

recipe_ingredients: Flour, Butter, Apples, Sugar, Cinnamon, Lemon Juice, Breadcrumbs, Raisins
instructions: Mix flour, eggs, water, and butter to make the dough. Roll out thinly. Mix apples with sugar, cinnamon, lemon juice, and raisins. Spread the mixture on the dough, roll tightly, and bake at 180°C for 40 minutes. Serve with powdered sugar and cream.

recipe_ingredients: Potatoes, Onions, Eggs, Flour, Salt, Pepper, Oil
instructions: Grate potatoes and onions, then drain excess water. Mix with eggs, flour, salt, and pepper. Form pancakes and fry until golden brown. Serve with applesauce or sour cream.

recipe_ingredients: Pork Knuckle, Salt, Pepper, Bay Leaves, Onions, Sauerkraut, Potatoe
instructions: Boil the pork knuckle with onions, bay leaves, salt, and pepper until tender. Serve with sauerkraut and boiled potatoes. Optionally, bake to crisp the skin.

recipe_ingredients: Bratwurst, Pretzels, Mustard, Butter, Flour, Yeast, Baking Soda
instructions: Grill or fry bratwurst until golden. For pretzels, mix flour, yeast, water, and salt. Form pretzels, boil briefly in baking soda water, then bake. Serve with mustard.

recipe_ingredients: Flour, Eggs, Milk, Sugar, Butter, Raisins, Powdered Sugar
instructions: Make a pancake batter with eggs, flour, milk, and sugar. Pour into a buttered pan, add raisins, and cook. Tear into pieces and cook further until golden. Serve with powdered sugar and applesauce.

recipe_ingredients: Beef Roast, Vinegar, Onions, Carrots, Bay Leaves, Peppercorns, Sugar, Gingerbread
instructions: Marinate the beef in vinegar, onions, and spices for 3 days. Sear the beef, then simmer with marinade and water. Add gingerbread to thicken the sauce. Serve with red cabbage and dumplings.

recipe_ingredients: Weißwurst (Bavarian Sausage), Pretzels, Mustard, Parsley, Onions, Salt, Butter
instructions: Boil Weißwurst in hot water. Serve with fresh pretzels, mustard, and sauerkraut. Traditionally paired with a Bavarian wheat beer.

recipe_ingredients: Apples, Flour, Sugar, Eggs, Butter, Baking Powder, Cinnamon
instructions: Slice apples and toss with cinnamon and sugar. Prepare cake batter, pour into a pan, and arrange apple slices on top. Bake at 180°C for 40 minutes. Serve with whipped cream.

recipe_ingredients: Herring Fillets, Onions, Pickles, Mustard, Vinegar, Sugar, Bay Leaves
instructions: Spread mustard on herring fillets, add a pickle and onion, and roll them up. Secure with toothpicks. Marinate in vinegar with bay leaves and sugar for at least 24 hours. Serve cold.

recipe_ingredients: Rye Flour, Water, Yeast, Salt, Caraway Seeds, Molasses
instructions: Mix rye flour, water, and yeast to form a dough. Let it ferment, then bake slowly at a low temperature for up to 16 hours. Serve with butter, cheese, or meats

recipe_ingredients: Gram Flour, Buttermilk, Turmeric, Ginger, Green Chilies, Mustard Seeds, Curry Leaves, Coriander, Coconut
instructions: Mix gram flour, buttermilk, turmeric, and ginger paste into a smooth batter. Cook on low heat until thick. Spread thinly, cut into strips, and roll. Garnish with mustard seeds, coconut, and coriander.

available_ingredients: Rice, Yogurt, Mustard Seeds, Curry Leaves
recipe_ingredients: Rice, Gram Flour, Yogurt, Ginger, Green Chilies, Mustard Seeds, Curry Leaves, Lemon Juice
instructions: Mix rice flour, gram flour, and yogurt into a smooth batter. Ferment overnight. Steam the batter, then temper with mustard seeds, curry leaves, and green chilies.

recipe_ingredients: Gram Flour, Carom Seeds, Turmeric, Baking Soda, Oil, Salt, Water
instructions: Make a stiff dough using gram flour, carom seeds, turmeric, and water. Roll into thin strips and fry until crispy. Serve with chutney and jalebi.

available_ingredients: Besan, Buttermilk, Mustard Seeds, Curry Leaves
recipe_ingredients: Yogurt, Gram Flour, Ginger, Green Chilies, Mustard Seeds, Curry Leaves, Turmeric, Salt, Sugar
instructions: Whisk yogurt, water, and gram flour. Cook with ginger, chilies, and spices. Simmer until thickened. Serve with steamed rice.

recipe_ingredients: Wheat Flour, Gram Flour, Spinach, Yogurt, Turmeric, Cumin Seeds, Chili Powder, Oil
instructions: Knead dough with flour, spinach, yogurt, and spices. Roll into thin discs and cook on a tawa with oil. Serve with pickle and yogurt.

available_ingredients: Toor Dal, Tomatoes, Turmeric, Mustard Seeds, Curry Leaves, Jaggery, Tamarind
recipe_ingredients: Toor Dal, Tomatoes, Turmeric, Mustard Seeds, Curry Leaves, Jaggery, Tamarind, Green Chilies
instructions: Cook toor dal with turmeric. Temper with mustard seeds, curry leaves, and green chilies. Add tomatoes, jaggery, tamarind water, and salt. Simmer and serve with rice.

available_ingredients: Rice, Gram Flour, Yogurt, Bottle Gourd, Ginger, Green Chilies, Mustard Seeds, Sesame Seeds
recipe_ingredients: Rice, Gram Flour, Yogurt, Bottle Gourd, Ginger, Green Chilies, Mustard Seeds, Sesame Seeds
instructions: Soak rice and gram flour for 4 hours. Grind into a batter. Add grated bottle gourd, yogurt, ginger, and chilies. Pour into a tray, sprinkle sesame seeds, and bake at 180°C for 30 minutes.

available_ingredients: Tomatoes, Sev, Onions, Ginger, Garlic, Mustard Seeds, Cumin Seeds, Turmeric, Chili Powder
recipe_ingredients: Tomatoes, Sev, Onions, Ginger, Garlic, Mustard Seeds, Cumin Seeds, Turmeric, Chili Powder
instructions: Sauté mustard and cumin seeds in oil. Add onions, ginger, and garlic. Add tomatoes, turmeric, and chili powder. Cook until soft. Add water and simmer. Add sev before serving. Serve with roti or rice.

available_ingredients: Fish, Coconut, Tamarind, Green Chilies, Turmeric, Garlic, Onions, Coriander
recipe_ingredients: Fish, Coconut Milk, Tamarind, Green Chilies, Turmeric, Garlic, Onions, Coriander, Mustard Seeds, Curry Leaves
instructions: Marinate fish with turmeric and salt. Grind coconut, tamarind, and chilies into a paste. Heat oil, sauté onions and garlic. Add the paste and water. Simmer. Add fish and cook for 10 minutes. Garnish with coriander and serve with rice.

available_ingredients: Chicken, Coconut Milk, Vinegar, Green Chilies, Onions, Ginger, Garlic, Cloves
recipe_ingredients: Chicken, Coconut Milk, Vinegar, Green Chilies, Onions, Ginger, Garlic, Cloves, Cinnamon, Coriander Seeds, Turmeric
instructions: Roast grated coconut, onions, and spices. Grind into a paste. Marinate chicken with turmeric and salt. Cook chicken in the paste, add coconut milk and vinegar. Simmer until chicken is tender. Serve hot.

available_ingredients: Pork, Vinegar, Red Chilies, Garlic, Ginger, Cloves, Cinnamon, Turmeric
recipe_ingredients: Pork, Vinegar, Red Chilies, Garlic, Ginger, Cloves, Cinnamon, Turmeric, Onions, Cumin, Mustard Seeds
instructions: Marinate pork with vinegar, red chili paste, and spices for 2 hours. Heat oil, sauté onions, garlic, and ginger. Add pork and cook until browned. Add water and simmer until tender. Serve with rice or bread.

recipe_ingredients: Coconut Milk, Eggs, Sugar, Flour, Ghee, Cardamom
instructions: Mix coconut milk, sugar, eggs, and flour. Grease a baking tray with ghee. Pour a layer of batter, bake until set, and repeat the layers. Continue until all batter is used. Serve after cooling.

available_ingredients: Prawns, Coconut, Green Chilies, Tamarind, Garlic, Turmeric
recipe_ingredients: Prawns, Coconut, Vinegar, Green Chilies, Garlic, Turmeric, Mustard Seeds, Curry Leaves
instructions: Marinate prawns with turmeric and salt. Heat oil, sauté garlic and mustard seeds. Add prawns, vinegar, and chilies. Cook until prawns are done. Serve with rice.

available_ingredients: Rice, Coconut Milk, Jaggery, Cashews, Raisins
recipe_ingredients: Rice, Coconut Milk, Jaggery, Cashews, Raisins, Cardamom
instructions: Cook rice in coconut milk with cardamom. Add jaggery for sweetness. Garnish with roasted cashews and raisins. Serve as a sweet dish or dessert.

available_ingredients: Eggs, Onions, Potatoes, Tomatoes, Green Chilies, Coriander
recipe_ingredients: Eggs, Onions, Potatoes, Tomatoes, Green Chilies, Coriander, Coconut Milk, Turmeric
instructions: Boil eggs and potatoes. Sauté onions and tomatoes in oil. Add turmeric and green chilies. Pour in coconut milk. Add boiled eggs and potatoes. Simmer for 10 minutes. Garnish with coriander and serve with rice or bread.

available_ingredients: Vegetables, Coconut, Mustard Seeds, Curry Leaves, Green Chilies
recipe_ingredients: Vegetables (Pumpkin, Beans, Carrots), Coconut, Mustard Seeds, Curry Leaves, Green Chilies, Turmeric
instructions: Grind coconut into a smooth paste. Sauté mustard seeds and curry leaves in oil. Add vegetables, green chilies, and turmeric. Pour in coconut milk and simmer until vegetables are tender. Serve with rice.

available_ingredients: Rice Flour, Jaggery, Coconut, Cardamom, Banana Leaves
recipe_ingredients: Rice Flour, Jaggery, Grated Coconut, Cardamom, Ghee, Banana Leaves
instructions: Mix rice flour with water to form dough. Prepare filling using jaggery, coconut, and cardamom. Shape into dumplings, stuff with the filling, and steam using banana leaves. Serve warm.

available_ingredients: Chickpeas, Tea Bags, Onions, Tomatoes, Ginger, Garlic, Spices, Coriander
recipe_ingredients: Chickpeas, Onions, Tomatoes, Ginger, Garlic, Tea Bags, Spices, Wheat Flour, Curd, Baking Soda
instructions: Soak chickpeas overnight and boil with tea bags for color. Cook a masala with onions, tomatoes, and spices, then mix in the chickpeas. For Bhature, make dough using flour, curd, and soda, then fry into puffed bread. Serve hot.

available_ingredients: White Bread, Potatoes, Chickpeas, Yogurt, Tamarind Chutney, Spices
recipe_ingredients: Potatoes, Bread, Chickpeas, Yogurt, Tamarind Chutney, Spices
instructions: Fry potato cubes until crispy, then combine with toasted bread pieces and chickpeas. Add yogurt, chutneys, and spices. Garnish with sev and coriander.

available_ingredients: Rice, Lentils, Spices, Tamarind, Mustard Seeds
recipe_ingredients: Rice, Moong Dal, Spices, Tamarind, Mustard Seeds, Curry Leaves
instructions: Cook rice and dal together until soft. Temper with mustard seeds, curry leaves, and spices. Serve with curd or pickles.

available_ingredients: Rice, Lentils, Tamarind, Mustard Seeds, Curry Leaves
recipe_ingredients: Rajma (Red Kidney Beans), Rice, Onions, Tomatoes, Ginger, Garlic, Spices
instructions: Soak and cook rajma. Prepare a curry using onions, tomatoes, ginger, and garlic. Simmer cooked rajma in the curry. Serve with steamed rice.

available_ingredients: Fish, Mustard Seeds, Mustard Oil, Turmeric, Salt, Green Chilies
recipe_ingredients: Fish, Tomatoes, Mustard Seeds, Mustard Oil, Turmeric, Salt, Lemon, Green Chilies
instructions: Clean and marinate the fish with turmeric and salt. Heat mustard oil in a pan until it reaches its smoking point, then fry the fish until golden brown. In the same pan, add mustard seeds and chopped tomatoes, cooking until the tomatoes soften. Add water, salt, and green chilies to create a tangy broth. Place the fried fish into the broth and cook on low heat until well combined. Squeeze lemon juice before serving with plain rice.

recipe_ingredients: Rice Flour, Jaggery, Cardamom, Coconut, Salt
instructions: Mix rice flour with water to form a soft dough. Prepare a sweet filling by melting jaggery with grated coconut and cardamom until thickened. Shape the dough into discs and add the filling. Seal the edges and steam the pithas until cooked. Serve warm as a traditional snack.

available_ingredients: Bamboo Shoots, Pork, Garlic, Ginger, Green Chilies
recipe_ingredients: Pork, Bamboo Shoots, Garlic, Ginger, Green Chilies, Salt, Mustard Oil
instructions: Boil pork pieces until tender. Heat mustard oil in a pan and sauté chopped garlic, ginger, and green chilies until fragrant. Add the boiled pork and bamboo shoots, mixing well. Cover and cook until the bamboo shoots soften and the pork absorbs the flavors. Adjust salt as needed and serve with steamed rice.

available_ingredients: Duck Meat, Potatoes, Whole Spices, Mustard Oil
recipe_ingredients: Duck Meat, Potatoes, Bay Leaves, Whole Spices, Ginger, Garlic, Onions
instructions: Clean and cut the duck meat into pieces. Heat mustard oil and fry bay leaves, cloves, and cinnamon until aromatic. Add chopped onions, ginger, and garlic, and sauté until golden brown. Add the duck meat and sear it. Add cubed potatoes and enough water to cover. Simmer until the duck is tender and the gravy thickens. Serve with rice.

recipe_ingredients: Rice, Milk, Sugar, Cardamom, Saffron
instructions: Wash and soak the rice for about 30 minutes. Boil milk in a heavy-bottomed pot and add the rice. Cook on low heat, stirring frequently until the rice becomes soft. Add sugar, crushed cardamom, and saffron strands. Continue cooking until the mixture thickens to a creamy consistency. Serve warm or chilled as a dessert

available_ingredients: Crab, Mustard Oil, Garlic, Ginger, Turmeric, Chilies
recipe_ingredients: Small Fish or Crab, Mustard Oil, Garlic, Ginger, Turmeric, Tomatoes, Lemon
instructions: Clean the fish or crab thoroughly. Heat mustard oil in a pan and add garlic, ginger, and turmeric. Sauté for a minute before adding chopped tomatoes. Cook until the tomatoes break down. Add water and salt to create a broth. Simmer and add the fish or crab, cooking until tender. Finish with lemon juice for tanginess and serve with rice.

available_ingredients: Chicken, Bamboo Shoots, Ginger, Garlic, Chilies
recipe_ingredients: Chicken, Bamboo Shoots, Garlic, Ginger, Chilies, Mustard Oil, Salt
instructions: Cut the chicken into bite-sized pieces and marinate with turmeric and salt. Heat mustard oil in a pan and sauté garlic, ginger, and green chilies. Add the chicken pieces and cook until browned. Add bamboo shoots and a little water. Cover and cook until the chicken is tender and the bamboo shoots are soft. Serve with plain rice.

available_ingredients: Wheat Flour, Chana Dal, Garlic, Ginger, Green Chilies, Spices
recipe_ingredients: Wheat Flour, Chana Dal, Mustard Oil, Garlic, Ginger, Green Chilies, Lemon, Spices
instructions: Prepare a dough with wheat flour, salt, and water. For the stuffing, mix roasted chana dal, garlic, ginger, green chilies, and mustard oil with spices. Shape the dough into balls, fill them with the stuffing, and seal. Roast the littis in a tandoor or over charcoal until golden brown. Serve with chokha, made by mashing boiled potatoes, roasted eggplants, tomatoes, mustard oil, and spices.

recipe_ingredients: Flattened Rice (Chura), Fresh Curd, Sugar, Banana, Mango (optional)
instructions: Soak the flattened rice in water for a few minutes and drain. Mix it with fresh curd and sugar. Top with sliced bananas or mangoes for added flavor. Serve as a simple and nutritious breakfast.

available_ingredients: Rice, Black Gram, Mustard Oil, Cumin, Garlic
recipe_ingredients: Wheat Flour, Sattu (Roasted Gram Flour), Mustard Oil, Garlic, Green Chilies, Onions
instructions: Prepare a dough using wheat flour. For the filling, mix sattu with chopped onions, green chilies, garlic, mustard oil, and spices. Stuff the dough with the sattu mixture and roll it out into parathas. Cook on a hot griddle with ghee until golden brown. Serve with curd or pickle.

available_ingredients: Green Mango, Jaggery, Cumin Seeds, Mustard Oil
recipe_ingredients: Raw Mangoes, Jaggery, Black Salt, Cumin Seeds, Mint Leaves
instructions: Boil the raw mangoes until soft. Peel and blend the pulp with jaggery, black salt, and roasted cumin seeds. Add water to dilute and garnish with mint leaves. Serve chilled as a refreshing summer drink.

available_ingredients: Rice, Tamarind, Turmeric, Green Chilies, Curry Leaves, Spices
recipe_ingredients: Cooked Rice, Tamarind Pulp, Turmeric, Mustard Seeds, Curry Leaves, Green Chilies, Peanuts, Hing, Salt, Oil
instructions: Cook the rice and spread it to cool. Soak tamarind in warm water and extract the pulp. Heat oil in a pan, add mustard seeds, dry red chilies, curry leaves, and peanuts. Sauté until golden. Add the tamarind pulp, turmeric, and salt. Cook until it thickens. Pour the tamarind mixture over the rice and mix gently until well coated. Let it sit for 30 minutes for flavors to infuse. Serve with fried papad or yogurt.

recipe_ingredients: Chicken, Onions, Tomatoes, Ginger-Garlic Paste, Curry Leaves, Garam Masala, Red Chili Powder, Coriander Powder, Oil, Salt
instructions: Heat oil in a large pan, add sliced onions and curry leaves. Sauté until golden. Add ginger-garlic paste and cook until fragrant. Add chopped tomatoes and cook until soft. Mix in red chili powder, turmeric, and garam masala. Add chicken pieces and cook until they are coated with the spices. Pour in water, cover, and simmer until the chicken is tender and the gravy thickens. Garnish with fresh coriander leaves and serve with rice.

recipe_ingredients: Small Brinjals, Tamarind Pulp, Onions, Garlic, Green Chilies, Coriander Seeds, Curry Leaves, Oil, Salt
instructions: Slit the brinjals crosswise without cutting through completely. Soak tamarind in warm water to extract the pulp. Dry roast coriander seeds, cumin seeds, garlic, and chilies, then blend to a paste. Stuff the brinjals with the paste. Heat oil in a pan, add mustard seeds and curry leaves. Place the stuffed brinjals in the pan and fry for a few minutes. Pour in the tamarind pulp and water, then cook covered until the brinjals are soft. Serve hot with steamed rice.

available_ingredients: Lentils, Tamarind, Vegetables, Curry Leaves, Spices
recipe_ingredients: Toor Dal, Tamarind, Green Chilies, Tomatoes, Curry Leaves, Mustard Seeds, Turmeric, Salt, Oil
instructions: Rinse and boil toor dal with turmeric and water until soft. Mash the cooked dal. In a separate bowl, soak tamarind and extract its pulp. Heat oil in a pan, add mustard seeds, dry red chilies, green chilies, and curry leaves. Once fragrant, add chopped tomatoes and sauté until soft. Add the tamarind pulp and bring it to a boil. Mix the cooked dal into the tamarind mixture. Simmer until the flavors combine. Serve hot with steamed rice and ghee.

available_ingredients: Rice, Green Chilies, Yogurt, Mustard Seeds
recipe_ingredients: Cooked Rice, Curd, Green Chilies, Mustard Seeds, Curry Leaves, Ginger, Coriander, Salt
instructions: Mash cooked rice and let it cool slightly. Add fresh curd and mix well. Heat oil in a small pan, add mustard seeds, curry leaves, and chopped green chilies. Sauté until fragrant and pour this tempering over the curd rice. Mix in finely grated ginger and fresh coriander. Serve chilled with mango pickle or papad.

available_ingredients: Fish, Tamarind, Curry Leaves, Mustard Seeds, Spices
recipe_ingredients: Fish, Tamarind Pulp, Onions, Tomatoes, Green Chilies, Curry Leaves, Garlic, Turmeric, Red Chili Powder, Coriander Powder, Oil, Salt
instructions: Clean and marinate the fish with turmeric and salt. Heat oil in a wide pan, add mustard seeds, curry leaves, and sliced onions. Sauté until golden brown. Add garlic, green chilies, and chopped tomatoes, cooking until the oil separates. Add tamarind pulp, water, red chili powder, and salt. Simmer for a few minutes, then add the fish pieces. Cook gently until the fish is tender and absorbs the flavors. Garnish with fresh coriander leaves and serve with hot rice.

recipe_ingredients: Rice Starch, Ghee, Sugar, Cardamom Powder, Cashews, Almonds
instructions: Prepare thin rice starch sheets by spreading rice flour batter on a hot pan. Carefully peel and stack them. Mix sugar and cardamom powder. Brush each rice sheet with ghee, sprinkle sugar, and layer with chopped nuts. Roll the sheets tightly to form a cylindrical shape. Slice and serve as a sweet delicacy during festivals.

recipe_ingredients: Raw Mangoes, Mustard Seeds, Red Chili Powder, Turmeric, Salt, Mustard Oil
instructions: Wash and dry the raw mangoes. Cut them into small pieces. Mix mustard seeds, red chili powder, turmeric, and salt in a bowl. Add mustard oil and blend into a thick paste. Coat the mango pieces with this mixture. Store in an airtight container and allow the flavors to mature for a few days before serving. Enjoy with steamed rice and ghee.

available_ingredients: Wheat Flour, Ghee, Jaggery, Cardamom, Water
recipe_ingredients: Wheat Flour, Ghee, Jaggery, Cardamom Powder, Water, Oil for Frying
instructions: Mix wheat flour, ghee, and a pinch of salt in a bowl. Prepare a jaggery syrup by melting jaggery in water and adding cardamom powder. Add the syrup gradually to the flour and knead into a firm dough. Divide the dough into small balls, roll them into puris, and deep-fry in oil until golden. Serve hot.

available_ingredients: Chana Dal, Wheat Flour, Ghee, Spices
recipe_ingredients: Chana Dal, Wheat Flour, Ghee, Cumin Seeds, Fennel Seeds, Ginger, Green Chilies, Hing, Salt, Oil
instructions: Soak chana dal for 2 hours, then grind it into a coarse paste. Heat ghee in a pan, add cumin, fennel seeds, ginger, and green chilies. Cook until fragrant. Mix this with wheat flour, add salt, and knead into a dough. Roll into puris and fry until crisp. Serve with spicy potato curry.

recipe_ingredients: Potatoes, Tomatoes, Green Chilies, Ginger, Cumin Seeds, Hing, Turmeric, Coriander Powder, Salt, Oil
instructions: Boil the potatoes, peel, and roughly break them. Heat oil in a pan, add cumin seeds, hing, and green chilies. Add grated ginger and sauté. Add chopped tomatoes and cook until mushy. Add turmeric, coriander powder, and salt. Mix in the potatoes and water to adjust the consistency. Simmer for 10 minutes and serve with puris or roti.

available_ingredients: Wheat Flour, Ghee, Jaggery, Fennel Seed
recipe_ingredients: Wheat Flour, Milk, Jaggery, Fennel Seeds, Ghee, Sugar, Cardamom Powder
instructions: Mix flour, jaggery, and milk to form a smooth batter. Add fennel seeds for flavor. Heat ghee in a shallow pan. Pour a ladleful of the batter to form small pancakes. Fry until golden brown. In a separate pan, prepare sugar syrup with cardamom. Dip the malpuas in the syrup for a few seconds and serve warm.

available_ingredients: Wheat Flour, Semolina, Ghee, Sugar, Milk
recipe_ingredients: Wheat Flour, Semolina, Ghee, Sugar, Baking Soda, Milk, Cardamom Powder, Water, Pistachios
instructions: In a bowl, mix wheat flour, semolina, baking soda, and ghee. Knead with milk into a soft dough. Make small round shapes with a dent in the center. Heat ghee and fry on low flame until golden brown. Prepare sugar syrup with water, sugar, and cardamom. Dip fried balushahi in syrup. Garnish with chopped pistachios.

available_ingredients: Rice, Yogurt, Milk, Cardamom, Sugar, Dry Fruits
recipe_ingredients: Rice, Full Cream Milk, Sugar, Cardamom Powder, Almonds, Pistachios, Saffron
instructions: Soak rice for 2 hours, then grind into a coarse paste. Boil milk in a pan. Add rice paste, stirring continuously. Cook on low flame until it thickens. Add sugar, cardamom powder, and saffron. Cook further until desired consistency. Garnish with dry fruits and serve chilled.

available_ingredients: Wheat Flour, Jaggery, Fennel Seeds, Ghee
recipe_ingredients: Wheat Flour, Jaggery, Fennel Seeds, Ghee, Salt, Water
instructions: Dissolve jaggery in warm water. Mix wheat flour, fennel seeds, and a pinch of salt. Add the jaggery water to form a dough. Roll into thick rotis and cook on a tawa with ghee until both sides are golden brown. Serve with fresh butter.

recipe_ingredients: Khoya (Reduced Milk), Sugar, Cardamom Powder, Saffron, Pistachios
instructions: In a pan, cook khoya on low flame until it turns golden. Add sugar, cardamom powder, and saffron. Stir well until it thickens. Let it cool slightly. Shape into small round pedas and press with a pistachio on top. Allow to set and serve.

available_ingredients: Milk, Lemon Juice, Sugar, Cardamom, Saffron
recipe_ingredients: Milk, Lemon Juice, Sugar, Cardamom Powder, Saffron, Pistachios
instructions: Boil milk and add lemon juice to curdle it. Drain using a muslin cloth and rinse with cold water. Knead the chenna (paneer) until smooth. Shape into cylinders. Prepare sugar syrup in a wide pan. Boil the cylinders in syrup for 15 minutes. Allow to cool, garnish with cardamom and saffron, and serve.

recipe_ingredients: Black Chickpeas, Onions, Tomatoes, Green Chilies, Tamarind Chutney, Curd, Sev, Chaat Masala
instructions: Soak and boil chickpeas until soft. In a pan, heat oil, add cumin, green chilies, onions, and tomatoes. Cook until tender. Add the chickpeas and chaat masala. Mix well. Serve with tamarind chutney, curd, and sev. Garnish with coriander leaves.

recipe_ingredients: Fermented fish, potatoes, chili, salt
instructions: Boil the potatoes until they are soft and mash them thoroughly. In a separate pan, roast or boil the fermented fish until it is cooked. Crush the roasted fish and mix it well with the mashed potatoes. Add finely chopped chilies for spice. Adjust the salt as per taste. You can also add a little mustard oil for enhanced flavor. Serve the dish with steamed rice for an authentic experience.

recipe_ingredients: Fish, potatoes, turmeric, chili, salt
instructions: Clean the fish and cut it into pieces. In a pot, add water, turmeric, and salt, and bring it to a boil. Add the fish and cook until tender. Remove the fish and set aside. Peel and boil the potatoes separately. Mash them slightly for a chunky texture. Add the fish back into the pot, followed by the boiled potatoes. Mix gently without breaking the fish pieces. Adjust seasoning with salt and add fresh chilies for spice. Simmer for a few minutes until the curry thickens. Serve hot with steamed rice.

available_ingredients: Vegetables, mustard leaves, fermented soybeans, salt
recipe_ingredients: Vegetables, mustard leaves, fermented soybeans, salt
instructions: Wash and chop a variety of seasonal vegetables such as spinach, cabbage, and beans. In a large pot, add water and bring it to a boil. Add the vegetables and cook until they are tender. Separately, prepare a fermented soybean paste by mashing the soybeans and adding a little salt. Add the soybean paste to the boiling vegetables. Stir well to combine the flavors. Add mustard leaves towards the end for a distinct aroma. Adjust the salt as needed. Serve hot as a side dish with rice.

recipe_ingredients: Green chili, fermented fish, salt
instructions: Roast green chilies directly over a flame or in a dry pan until they are charred. Similarly, roast the fermented fish until aromatic. Using a mortar and pestle, crush the roasted chilies and fermented fish together to form a coarse paste. Add salt to taste. You can drizzle a few drops of mustard oil for an authentic touch. This spicy condiment is best served with steamed rice and simple vegetable curries.

available_ingredients: Pork, bamboo shoots, chili, garlic, ginger, salt
recipe_ingredients: Pork, bamboo shoots, chili, garlic, ginger, salt
instructions: Cut pork into bite-sized pieces. Boil it in a pot with water, adding salt. Add bamboo shoots and cook until tender. Prepare a paste with garlic, ginger, and chili. Add this paste to the pot and stir well. Simmer until the pork is fully cooked. Adjust salt if needed. Serve hot with rice.

available_ingredients: Rice, black lentils, ginger, mustard oil, turmeric, chili
recipe_ingredients: Black rice, milk, sugar, cardamom, bay leaf, nuts, raisins
instructions: Rinse the black rice and soak it for a few hours. Boil the rice in water until it softens. Add milk and stir continuously to prevent sticking. Add sugar, cardamom, and a bay leaf. Cook until the mixture thickens. Garnish with nuts and raisins. Serve chilled or warm.

available_ingredients: Pumpkin, fermented fish, garlic, mustard leaves, salt
recipe_ingredients: Pumpkin, fermented fish, garlic, mustard leaves, salt
instructions: Peel and chop the pumpkin. Boil the pumpkin pieces in water until soft. Separately, roast the fermented fish until aromatic. Add the fish to the pumpkin mixture. Cook for a few minutes, then add mustard leaves. Stir well and let it simmer until everything blends together. Season with salt. Serve with rice.

available_ingredients: Colocasia leaves, fermented soybeans, garlic, ginger, chili
recipe_ingredients: Colocasia leaves, fermented soybeans, garlic, ginger, chili
instructions: Clean and chop the colocasia leaves. Boil them in water until tender. Drain and set aside. Mash the fermented soybeans and mix them with crushed garlic, ginger, and chili. Combine the paste with the boiled leaves. Add salt to taste. Serve as a side dish.

available_ingredients: Fish, mustard oil, turmeric, fenugreek, salt, garlic
recipe_ingredients: Fermented fish, garlic, turmeric, chili, mustard oil, fenugreek
instructions: Heat mustard oil in a pan. Add fenugreek seeds until they crackle. Add crushed garlic and sauté until golden. Add fermented fish and turmeric. Cook until fragrant. Add water and simmer until the fish is cooked through. Serve with rice.

available_ingredients: Vegetables, rice, dried fish, garlic, ginger, chili
recipe_ingredients: Seasonal vegetables, dried fish, garlic, ginger, chili
instructions: Chop the vegetables into bite-sized pieces. Boil water in a pot and add the vegetables. Cook until tender. Add dried fish and simmer for a few more minutes. Prepare a paste using garlic, ginger, and chili, then add it to the pot. Cook until the flavors combine. Season with salt and serve hot.

available_ingredients: Rice, black lentils, ginger, mustard oil, turmeric, chili
recipe_ingredients: Boiled vegetables, fermented fish, ginger, mustard oil, salt
instructions: Boil assorted vegetables such as potatoes, pumpkin, or beans. Drain excess water and mash the vegetables. Roast the fermented fish until aromatic. Mix the fish with the mashed vegetables. Add ginger paste and drizzle with mustard oil. Adjust salt as per taste. Serve with rice.

available_ingredients: Parotta, egg, oil, onion, tomato, green chili, ginger, garlic, curry leaves
recipe_ingredients: Parotta, egg, onion, tomato, green chili, ginger, garlic, curry leaves, pepper, garam masala
instructions: Heat oil in a pan and sauté chopped onions, garlic, and ginger until golden. Add tomatoes and green chilies. Break parottas into small pieces. Crack eggs into the pan and scramble. Add the parotta pieces and stir well. Sprinkle garam masala, salt, and pepper. Mix until combined. Serve hot with raita.

available_ingredients: Mutton, shallots, garlic, ginger, turmeric, red chili powder, coriander powder, pepper
recipe_ingredients: Mutton, shallots, garlic, ginger, turmeric, red chili powder, coriander powder, pepper, curry leaves
instructions: Marinate the mutton with turmeric, chili powder, and salt. Heat oil in a pot, add shallots, ginger, garlic, and sauté until fragrant. Add the marinated mutton and cook until brown. Pour water and simmer until tender. Season with pepper and coriander powder. Serve with rice or dosa.

available_ingredients: Rice, milk, ghee, cardamom, cashew nuts, raisins, saffron
recipe_ingredients: Milk, almond gum (badam pisin), nannari syrup, ice cream, sugar
instructions: Soak almond gum in water overnight. Boil milk until it thickens. Add sugar and let it cool. In a glass, add nannari syrup, soaked almond gum, and cold milk. Top with a scoop of ice cream. Mix well and serve chilled.

available_ingredients: Rice, toor dal, garlic, cumin, black pepper, curry leaves
recipe_ingredients: Tamarind, garlic, cumin, black pepper, curry leaves, coriander leaves
instructions: Soak tamarind in water and extract the juice. Crush garlic, cumin, and pepper. Heat oil, add mustard seeds and curry leaves. Add the crushed mixture and sauté until fragrant. Pour in tamarind water. Boil and simmer for a few minutes. Garnish with coriander leaves and serve hot.

available_ingredients: Rice, urad dal, pepper, cumin, coconut, curry leaves, ghee
recipe_ingredients: Raw rice, urad dal, jaggery, grated coconut, cardamom, ghee, oil
instructions: Soak rice and urad dal for a few hours and grind into a smooth batter. Add jaggery, grated coconut, and cardamom powder. Heat oil in a deep pan. Pour small amounts of batter into the oil and fry until golden brown. Serve warm.

available_ingredients: vGoat intestines, onion, garlic, ginger, turmeric, chili powder, pepper
recipe_ingredients: Goat intestines, onion, garlic, ginger, turmeric, tamarind, chili powder, pepper
instructions: Clean the goat intestines thoroughly and boil them with turmeric. Heat oil in a pan, add onions, garlic, and ginger. Add the cleaned intestines and fry well. Pour in tamarind extract and spices. Simmer until the gravy thickens. Serve with rice or idli.

available_ingredients: Banana flower, lentils, coconut, red chilies, curry leaves
recipe_ingredients: Banana flower, chana dal, red chilies, onions, curry leaves, fennel seeds
instructions: Clean and chop the banana flower finely. Soak chana dal and grind coarsely. Mix with chopped banana flower, onions, red chilies, curry leaves, and fennel seeds. Shape into vadas and deep fry until golden brown. Serve with chutney.

available_ingredients: Country chicken, shallots, garlic, ginger, coconut, spices
recipe_ingredients: Country chicken, shallots, garlic, ginger, turmeric, red chili powder, coriander powder, coconut
instructions: Clean and cut the chicken. Sauté shallots, garlic, and ginger in oil. Add the chicken pieces, turmeric, and spice powders. Cook on low heat. Blend coconut into a paste and add to the curry. Simmer until the chicken is tender. Serve hot.

recipe_ingredients: Raw rice, moong dal, palm jaggery, grated coconut, ghee
instructions: Cook rice and moong dal together. Melt palm jaggery in water, strain, and add to the cooked rice. Mix well. Stir in grated coconut and ghee for enhanced flavor.

available_ingredients: Broken rice, moong dal, turmeric, pepper, ghee
recipe_ingredients: Broken rice, moong dal, mustard seeds, pepper, curry leaves
instructions: Dry roast broken rice and moong dal. In a pan, heat oil, add mustard seeds, pepper, and curry leaves. Add water and bring it to a boil. Stir in the roasted rice mixture. Cook until soft. Serve with coconut chutney.

available_ingredients: Rice flour, coconut milk, jaggery, cardamom
recipe_ingredients: Wheat flour, ghee, sugar, cashews, cardamom powder
instructions: Soak wheat flour in water overnight and extract the milk. Cook sugar in ghee until caramelized. Add the extracted wheat milk and stir continuously. Add cardamom and roasted cashews. Cook until the halwa becomes glossy and thick.

available_ingredients: Tamarind, black sesame seeds, red chilies, coconut
recipe_ingredients: Tamarind extract, black sesame seeds, dried red chilies, curry leaves, mustard seeds, oil
instructions: Roast sesame seeds and red chilies. Grind into a powder. Heat oil, add mustard seeds and curry leaves. Pour tamarind extract and add the ground powder. Cook until thickened. Serve with rice.

available_ingredients: Tapioca, grated coconut, mustard seeds, green chilies
