recipe_ingredients: apioca, coconut, rice flour, green chilies, mustard seeds, curry leaves
instructions: Grate boiled tapioca. Mix with rice flour, coconut, and salt. Steam the mixture. Season with mustard seeds and green chilies. Serve with chutney.

available_ingredients: Rice flour, urad dal flour, cumin seeds, sesame seeds
recipe_ingredients: Rice flour, urad dal flour, butter, cumin seeds, sesame seeds, oil
instructions: Mix rice flour, urad dal flour, and butter. Add cumin seeds and sesame seeds. Knead into a dough. Shape into murukku using a press and deep fry until crispy. Serve as a snack.

recipe_ingredients: Ripe jackfruit, jaggery, ghee, rice flour, cardamom
instructions: Steam jackfruit and mash it. Cook jaggery in water until thick. Add mashed jackfruit and stir until the mixture thickens. Add ghee and cardamom powder. Serve as a dessert.

available_ingredients: Rice, urad dal, coconut, curry leaves, mustard seeds
recipe_ingredients: Rice, mixed vegetables (beans, carrot, peas), toor dal, tamarind, sambar powder, mustard seeds
instructions: Wash and cook rice with turmeric. Cook toor dal until soft. Prepare tamarind extract. In a large pot, heat oil and temper mustard seeds, curry leaves, and dried chilies. Add chopped vegetables and sauté until soft. Pour tamarind extract and add sambar powder, salt, and cooked dal. Mix in the cooked rice and combine thoroughly. Simmer for 5 minutes and serve with appalam or curd.

recipe_ingredients: Raw rice, coconut milk, jaggery, cardamom powder
instructions: Wash and soak rice for 30 minutes. Cook the rice in water until soft. Extract thick coconut milk by blending grated coconut with warm water. Add jaggery to the cooked rice and stir well. Pour in the coconut milk and stir until combined. Simmer on low heat for 5-10 minutes. Add cardamom powder for flavor. Serve warm as a dessert.

available_ingredients: Rice, urad dal, fenugreek seeds, salt
recipe_ingredients: Raw rice, urad dal, fenugreek seeds, coconut milk, yeast
instructions: Soak rice, urad dal, and fenugreek seeds for 4-5 hours. Grind into a smooth batter using water. Add coconut milk and a pinch of yeast. Allow to ferment for 8 hours. Heat a non-stick pan, pour a ladle of batter, and cook covered until holes form on the surface. Serve with coconut milk and jaggery.

recipe_ingredients: Jackfruit, rice flour, jaggery, coconut milk, ghee, cardamom powder
instructions: Steam jackfruit until soft and mash it. Prepare jaggery syrup by dissolving jaggery in water. Cook the jackfruit in the syrup until well combined. Add thick coconut milk and stir gently. Simmer on low flame, then add cardamom powder and ghee for flavor. Serve warm as a dessert.

recipe_ingredients: Flattened rice (aval), jaggery, mashed banana, rice flour, cardamom powder, oil
instructions: Soak aval in water for a few minutes until soft. Mash a banana and mix it with jaggery syrup. Add the softened aval, rice flour, and cardamom powder to the mixture. Heat oil in a pan, drop spoonfuls of the batter, and deep-fry until golden brown. Serve as a snack.

recipe_ingredients: Rice flour, grated coconut, jaggery, cardamom powder
instructions: Roast rice flour and steam it. Layer the steamed rice flour with grated coconut and jaggery. Steam it again for 10 minutes. Serve as a breakfast or evening snack.

available_ingredients: Goat intestine, shallots, curry leaves, spices
recipe_ingredients: Goat leg, shallots, garlic, ginger, turmeric, chili powder, coriander powder, coconut milk, curry leaves
instructions: Clean the goat leg thoroughly and boil it until tender. In a pan, sauté shallots, garlic, and ginger. Add turmeric, chili powder, and coriander powder. Pour in the goat broth and coconut milk. Simmer until the flavors blend. Garnish with curry leaves and serve with hot idiyappam.

available_ingredients: Wheat flour, paneer, onion, capsicum, spices
recipe_ingredients: Paneer, wheat flour, onions, capsicum, chili powder, garam masala, coriander, yogurt, oil
instructions: Prepare dough using wheat flour and water. Marinate paneer with yogurt and spices. Sauté onions and capsicum, then add paneer. Cook until golden. Roll out the dough, cook on a tawa, and stuff with the paneer mixture. Add chutney or sauce, roll it up, and serve.

available_ingredients: Chicken breast, flour, egg, breadcrumbs, lettuce
recipe_ingredients: Chicken breast, flour, egg, breadcrumbs, mayonnaise, lettuce, tomatoes, tortillas, oil
instructions: Coat chicken with flour, dip in beaten egg, and cover with breadcrumbs. Fry until crispy. Place it on a tortilla with lettuce, tomatoes, and mayonnaise. Wrap it tightly and serve.

available_ingredients: oiled eggs, onion, green chilies, spices
recipe_ingredients: Eggs, onions, green chilies, wheat flour, tomato sauce, chili sauce, oil
instructions: Beat eggs with salt and pepper. Cook paratha on a tawa, spread beaten egg on top, and flip. Add sautéed onions and green chilies. Spread sauces, roll it up, and serve hot.

available_ingredients: Mushroom, cheese, black pepper, wheat flour
recipe_ingredients: Mushrooms, cheese, garlic, black pepper, wheat flour, butter, milk
instructions: Sauté mushrooms with garlic and butter. Add flour, milk, and grated cheese to make a creamy sauce. Spread the filling on a tortilla, roll it, and bake for a few minutes until crispy. Serve hot.

recipe_ingredients: Carrot, cucumber, lettuce, bell peppers, hummus, whole wheat tortillas
instructions: Spread hummus on a whole wheat tortilla. Add thinly sliced vegetables, sprinkle some salt and pepper, and wrap it tightly. Serve with yogurt dip.

recipe_ingredients: Milk, sugar, cardamom, saffron, almonds, lemon juice, rose water
instructions: Boil milk, add lemon juice to curdle it. Strain and shape the paneer into discs. Boil in sugar syrup. Simmer in saffron-infused milk with cardamom. Garnish with almonds and rose water. Chill and serve.

recipe_ingredients: Semolina, sugar, ghee, cashews, raisins, saffron, cardamom
instructions: Roast semolina in ghee. Boil water, add saffron, then add to semolina. Stir in sugar and cardamom powder. Add fried cashews and raisins. Mix well until it thickens. Serve warm.

recipe_ingredients: Paneer, sugar, cardamom, saffron
instructions: Knead paneer until smooth. Cook it with sugar on low heat. Shape it into small pieces. Garnish with cardamom and saffron. Chill and serve.

recipe_ingredients: Cream cheese, sugar, eggs, biscuits, butter, vanilla essence
instructions: Crush biscuits and mix with melted butter to form the crust. Beat cream cheese, sugar, and eggs. Pour over the crust and bake at 160°C for 50 minutes. Chill and serve with fruit topping.

recipe_ingredients: Phyllo dough, butter, sugar, honey, pistachios, walnuts
instructions: Layer phyllo dough sheets with butter and chopped nuts. Bake until golden. Pour a sugar-honey syrup over it and allow it to soak. Serve warm or chilled.

recipe_ingredients: Chicken breast, garlic, butter, olive oil, lemon, parsley, salt, pepper
instructions: Heat olive oil in a pan. Add garlic and sauté until fragrant. Add chicken breasts and cook until golden brown. Add butter and lemon juice. Simmer until chicken is cooked through. Garnish with parsley and serve.

recipe_ingredients: Chicken thighs, garlic, honey, soy sauce, ginger, olive oil, pepper, sesame seeds
instructions: Sear chicken thighs until golden. In a bowl, mix garlic, honey, soy sauce, and ginger. Pour sauce over the chicken and cook until it thickens. Garnish with sesame seeds and serve with rice.

recipe_ingredients: Whole chicken, garlic, rosemary, lemon, olive oil, potatoes, salt, pepper
instructions: Rub the chicken with olive oil, garlic, rosemary, and lemon juice. Place in a roasting pan with potatoes. Roast in the oven at 200°C for 90 minutes, basting occasionally. Let it rest before serving.

recipe_ingredients: Chicken, garlic, onions, tomatoes, curry leaves, coconut milk, spices, coriander
instructions: Sauté onions and garlic. Add chicken and brown it. Stir in tomatoes, coconut milk, and spices. Simmer until the chicken is cooked. Garnish with coriander and serve with rice or naan.

recipe_ingredients: Chicken breast, garlic, marinara sauce, Parmesan cheese, mozzarella, breadcrumbs, olive oil
instructions: Coat chicken with breadcrumbs and fry until golden. Place in a baking dish, top with marinara sauce, garlic, and cheeses. Bake at 180°C until cheese is melted and bubbly. Serve with pasta.

available_ingredients: Onion, Tomato, Mustard, Oil, Curry Leaves
recipe_ingredients: Onions, tomatoes, mustard seeds, curry leaves, red chilies, tamarind, salt, oil
instructions: Heat oil in a pan. Add mustard seeds, let them splutter, and add curry leaves. Sauté onions until golden brown. Add chopped tomatoes and red chilies. Cook until soft. Add tamarind and salt. Blend into a smooth chutney. Serve with dosa or idli.

available_ingredients: Onion, Tomato, Mustard, Oil, Curry Leaves
recipe_ingredients: Tomatoes, onions, mustard seeds, curry leaves, tamarind, garlic, cumin, pepper, turmeric, salt
instructions: Boil tomatoes with tamarind. Mash and strain the pulp. Heat oil, add mustard seeds and curry leaves. Sauté onions and garlic. Add cumin, pepper, and turmeric. Pour in the tomato mixture. Simmer and serve hot with rice.

available_ingredients: Onion, Tomato, Mustard, Oil, Curry Leaves
recipe_ingredients: Onions, tomatoes, mustard seeds, curry leaves, garlic, red chili powder, turmeric, salt, oil
instructions: Heat oil in a pan. Add mustard seeds and curry leaves. Sauté garlic and onions till golden. Add chopped tomatoes, salt, turmeric, and chili powder. Cook until the oil separates. Serve with rice or chapati.

recipe_ingredients: Eggs, butter, bread, cheese, salt, pepper
instructions: Heat butter on a pan. Beat eggs with salt and pepper. Dip bread in the egg mixture. Place it on the pan, top with cheese, and cook until golden. Flip to toast both sides and melt the cheese.

recipe_ingredients: Eggs, butter, milk, flour, sugar, baking powder, salt, vanilla extract
instructions: Mix eggs, milk, sugar, and vanilla extract. Add flour, baking powder, and salt. Cook the batter on a buttered skillet. Serve with syrup or fruits.

available_ingredients: Egg, Butter, Rice, Soy Sauce, Spring Onion
recipe_ingredients: Eggs, butter, rice, soy sauce, spring onion, garlic, pepper
instructions: Cook the rice and allow it to cool completely. Leftover rice works well for this dish. Heat butter in a large wok or pan. Crack the eggs into the wok, season with salt, and scramble until cooked. Remove the eggs and set them aside. In the same pan, add a little more butter and sauté chopped garlic until fragrant. Add the cooled rice and toss well. Pour in the soy sauce and mix until the rice is coated. Return the scrambled eggs to the wok and stir to combine. Garnish with chopped spring onions and serve hot.

recipe_ingredients: Eggs, butter, potatoes, onion, green chilli, turmeric, cumin seeds
instructions: Boil the eggs and potatoes until cooked. Peel and set aside. Heat butter in a pan and add cumin seeds, letting them sizzle. Add finely chopped onions and green chilies, sautéing until golden brown. Stir in turmeric powder and mix well. Add the boiled potatoes, breaking them into chunks. Gently add the boiled eggs and coat them in the spice mixture. Allow the curry to simmer for a few minutes, stirring occasionally. Garnish with fresh coriander leaves and serve with rice or roti.

recipe_ingredients: Eggs, butter, bread, milk, sugar, cinnamon, vanilla extract
instructions: In a bowl, beat the eggs, milk, sugar, cinnamon, and vanilla extract until well combined. Heat a skillet over medium heat and melt a generous amount of butter. Dip each slice of bread into the egg mixture, ensuring both sides are soaked. Place the bread on the skillet and cook until golden brown on one side. Flip and cook the other side until crisp and golden. Serve with maple syrup, fresh fruit, or powdered sugar.

available_ingredients: Egg, Butter, Flour, Sugar, Baking Powder
recipe_ingredients: Butter, flour, sugar, milk, baking powder, vanilla extract
instructions: Preheat the oven to 350°F (180°C) and grease a baking pan. In a mixing bowl, cream the butter and sugar until light and fluffy. Gradually add the milk and vanilla extract, mixing well. Sift the flour and baking powder together. Gently fold the dry ingredients into the wet mixture until well combined. Pour the batter into the prepared baking pan. Bake for 30-35 minutes or until a toothpick inserted comes out clean. Allow it to cool before serving.

available_ingredients: Egg, Butter, Garlic, Cream, Parmesan Cheese
recipe_ingredients: Eggs, butter, garlic, cream, parmesan cheese, pasta, salt, pepper
instructions: Cook the pasta in salted boiling water until al dente. In a large skillet, melt the butter and sauté minced garlic until fragrant. In a bowl, whisk together eggs, cream, grated parmesan, salt, and pepper. Drain the pasta and add it to the skillet. Remove from heat and quickly pour in the egg mixture. Toss until the sauce thickens and coats the pasta. Serve with fresh parsley and additional parmesan cheese.

recipe_ingredients: Eggs, butter, sugar, hot coffee, condensed milk
instructions: Brew a strong cup of black coffee. Separate the egg yolk from the white. In a bowl, whisk the egg yolk with sugar until creamy and pale. Add butter and condensed milk, whisking until smooth. Pour the coffee into a glass and top it with the creamy egg mixture. Serve immediately, optionally stirring to mix the layers.

recipe_ingredients: Potato, onion, tomato, mustard seeds, cumin, turmeric, chili powder, salt, oil
instructions: Peel and chop the potatoes into cubes. Heat oil in a pan and add mustard seeds and cumin. Once they splutter, add chopped onions and sauté until golden brown. Add chopped tomatoes and cook until they turn mushy. Stir in turmeric, chili powder, and salt. Add the potatoes and mix well. Pour water, cover, and cook until the potatoes are tender. Garnish with coriander leaves and serve hot with rice or roti.

recipe_ingredients: Potato, onion, tomato, green peas, cumin, ginger, garlic, turmeric, garam masala, salt, oil
instructions: Heat oil in a pan and add cumin seeds. Add chopped onions and sauté until golden. Stir in ginger-garlic paste and cook until fragrant. Add chopped tomatoes and cook until soft. Add turmeric and garam masala. Add diced potatoes and green peas, mixing well. Pour in water and cook covered until the potatoes are soft. Serve with rice or chapati.

recipe_ingredients: Potato, onion, tomato, rice, mint, coriander, ginger, garlic, yogurt, whole spices (bay leaf, cinnamon, cloves), oil, salt
instructions: Soak rice for 30 minutes. In a pot, heat oil and sauté whole spices until aromatic. Add chopped onions and cook until golden. Add ginger-garlic paste and cook further. Stir in chopped tomatoes, potatoes, and yogurt. Cook until the potatoes are half done. Add water and bring it to a boil. Add soaked rice and cook until the rice is fluffy and the potatoes are tender. Garnish with coriander and serve hot.

recipe_ingredients: Potato, onion, tomato, gram flour, rice flour, cumin, turmeric, chili powder, salt, oil
instructions: Slice potatoes thinly. In a bowl, mix gram flour, rice flour, cumin, turmeric, chili powder, and salt. Gradually add water to make a thick batter. Heat oil in a deep pan. Dip each potato slice in the batter and deep fry until golden and crispy. Serve with tomato chutney or ketchup.

recipe_ingredients: Baby potatoes, onion, tomato, yogurt, cashew paste, ginger, garlic, cardamom, turmeric, garam masala, salt, oil
instructions: Boil and peel baby potatoes. Heat oil in a pan and shallow fry the potatoes until golden. Remove and set aside. In the same pan, sauté chopped onions until golden. Add ginger-garlic paste and cook well. Stir in chopped tomatoes and cook until soft. Add turmeric, garam masala, and cashew paste. Mix well. Add the fried potatoes and coat them with the masala. Pour in yogurt, cover, and simmer until the flavors blend. Garnish with coriander and serve.

available_ingredients: Wheat Flour, Egg, Salt, Oil, Water
recipe_ingredients: Wheat flour, egg, salt, oil, water, green chili, onion, coriander leaves
instructions: In a bowl, mix wheat flour, salt, and water to make a soft dough. Let it rest for 20 minutes. Divide the dough into balls and roll into thin circles. Heat a tawa (griddle). Crack an egg into a bowl, whisk it, and add chopped onion, green chili, and coriander. Place the rolled dough on the tawa, cook for a minute, then pour the egg mixture on top. Flip and cook both sides until golden. Serve with yogurt or pickle.

available_ingredients: Wheat Flour, Egg, Ghee, Salt, Water
recipe_ingredients: Wheat flour, egg, salt, ghee, onion, capsicum, ketchup, spices
instructions: Make a soft dough using wheat flour, salt, and water. Roll it into thin chapatis and cook on a tawa with ghee. In a separate pan, heat oil, add onions and capsicum, and sauté. Beat eggs, add salt and spices, and pour onto the pan to make an omelet. Place the omelet inside the chapati, roll it, and serve with ketchup.

recipe_ingredients: Wheat flour, egg, butter, sugar, salt, water
instructions: Prepare a rough puff pastry dough by mixing wheat flour, cold butter, and water. Chill and roll out the dough multiple times for layers. Beat an egg and brush the dough for a golden crust. Fill with a sweet or savory filling. Bake in a preheated oven at 180°C for 20-25 minutes until golden brown.

recipe_ingredients: Wheat flour, egg, sugar, butter, vanilla extract, baking soda
instructions: In a bowl, cream butter and sugar together. Beat in the egg and add vanilla extract. Sift wheat flour and baking soda and mix into the batter. Form small cookie dough balls and place them on a baking tray. Bake at 180°C for 12-15 minutes until golden. Cool and serve.

recipe_ingredients: Biscuits, sugar, milk, cocoa powder, vanilla essence, butter, nuts (optional)
instructions: Crush biscuits and layer them in a dish. In a pan, heat milk, sugar, cocoa powder, and vanilla essence until smooth. Pour the mixture over the biscuits, allowing them to soak. Chill in the refrigerator for 2 hours. Garnish with nuts if desired.

recipe_ingredients: Biscuits, sugar, milk, vanilla ice cream (optional), chocolate syrup
instructions: Crush biscuits into a fine powder. In a blender, add milk, sugar, biscuits, and ice cream (if using). Blend until smooth. Pour into a glass and top with chocolate syrup. Serve chilled.

recipe_ingredients: Biscuits, sugar, milk, cocoa powder, butter, baking powder
instructions: Crush the biscuits into fine crumbs. Add sugar, milk, cocoa powder, and baking powder to form a cake batter. Grease a cake tin with butter. Pour the batter into the tin and steam or bake for 20-30 minutes at 180°C. Allow it to cool before serving.

recipe_ingredients: Biscuits, sugar, milk, ghee, cardamom powder, nuts (optional)
instructions: Crush the biscuits. Heat ghee in a pan, add crushed biscuits, and roast until golden. Add milk and sugar, stirring continuously until the mixture thickens. Add cardamom powder and garnish with nuts. Serve warm.

recipe_ingredients: Biscuits, sugar, milk, cocoa powder, desiccated coconut
instructions: Crush biscuits and mix with cocoa powder and sugar. Add a little milk to bind the mixture. Form small balls and roll them in desiccated coconut. Refrigerate for an hour before serving.

recipe_ingredients: Biscuits, sugar, milk, instant coffee, whipped cream
instructions: Dissolve instant coffee in warm milk. Dip biscuits in the coffee mixture and layer them in a dish. Add whipped cream between layers. Repeat and refrigerate for 2-3 hours. Serve chilled.

recipe_ingredients: Potato, carrot, oil, mustard seeds, cumin, turmeric, red chili powder, salt, coriander
instructions: Peel and chop potatoes and carrots. Heat oil in a pan, add mustard seeds and cumin. Add the chopped vegetables, turmeric, red chili powder, and salt. Stir well, cover, and cook on low heat until tender. Garnish with coriander and serve.

recipe_ingredients: Potato, carrot, bread crumbs, flour, ginger, green chilies, coriander, garam masala, salt
instructions: Boil and mash potatoes and carrots. Add spices, chopped chilies, and coriander. Shape into patties, dip in flour slurry, coat with bread crumbs, and shallow fry until golden brown. Serve with chutney or ketchup.

recipe_ingredients: Vegetables, mustard leaves, fermented soybeans, salt
instructions: Boil potatoes and carrots until soft. Mash them together, add butter, and gradually mix in warm milk until creamy. Season with salt and pepper. Serve as a side dish.

recipe_ingredients: Potato, carrot, onion, tomato, ginger-garlic paste, spices (turmeric, chili powder, garam masala), salt
instructions: Heat oil in a pan. Add onions, ginger-garlic paste, and tomatoes. Add chopped potatoes and carrots. Cook with water and spices until vegetables are soft. Garnish with coriander leaves. Serve with rice or roti.

recipe_ingredients: Potato, carrot, peas, whole wheat flour, cumin seeds, green chilies, salt, oil
instructions: Grate boiled carrots and potatoes. Mix with peas, green chilies, and spices. Knead whole wheat flour with water. Stuff the vegetable filling into the dough, roll it flat, and cook on a tawa with oil. Serve with curd or pickle.

recipe_ingredients: Potato, carrot, rice, onion, garlic, green peas, spices (cumin, bay leaf, garam masala), salt
instructions: Heat oil in a cooker, add cumin seeds and bay leaf. Fry onions and garlic. Add chopped potatoes, carrots, peas, and washed rice. Add water, spices, and cook for 10 minutes. Serve hot.

recipe_ingredients: Potato, carrot, onion, garlic, vegetable broth, cream, olive oil, black pepper, salt
instructions: Heat oil in a pot, sauté onions and garlic. Add chopped potatoes and carrots. Pour in vegetable broth and cook until tender. Blend until smooth. Stir in cream, season with salt and pepper, and serve hot.

recipe_ingredients: Potato, carrot, grated cheese, flour, spices, oil
instructions: Grate potatoes and carrots. Mix with cheese, flour, and spices. Form small fritters and deep fry until golden brown. Serve with mint chutney or ketchup.

recipe_ingredients: Potato, carrot, yogurt, cumin, black salt, coriander
instructions: Boil and dice potatoes and carrots. Mix with whisked yogurt, salt, and cumin powder. Garnish with coriander. Serve as a cooling side dish.

recipe_ingredients: Potato, carrot, garlic, butter, rosemary, olive oil, salt, pepper
instructions: Chop potatoes and carrots into chunks. Toss with olive oil, minced garlic, rosemary, salt, and pepper. Roast in a preheated oven at 200°C for 30-35 minutes until golden and crispy. Serve as a side dish.

recipe_ingredients: Fish, onion, tomato, coconut milk, tamarind, garlic, turmeric, red chili powder, salt, oil
instructions: Heat oil and sauté garlic, onions, and tomatoes. Add turmeric and chili powder. Pour in coconut milk and tamarind juice. Bring to a boil, then add fish and cook until tender. Serve with rice.

recipe_ingredients: Fish, onion, tomato, rice, ginger-garlic paste, yogurt, garam masala, bay leaf, cinnamon, cloves, salt
instructions: Marinate fish in yogurt, ginger-garlic paste, and spices. Cook rice separately. In a pot, fry onions, tomatoes, and whole spices. Layer fish and rice, then cook on low heat. Garnish with fried onions and serve with raita.

recipe_ingredients: Fish, onion, tomato, green chilies, ginger, garlic, turmeric, garam masala, coriander, salt, oil
instructions: Heat oil in a pan. Sauté onions, garlic, and ginger. Add chopped tomatoes and green chilies. Cook until soft. Add spices and stir well. Add fish pieces and cook until done. Garnish with coriander and serve with roti.

recipe_ingredients: Fish, onion, tomato, lemon, olive oil, cucumber, lettuce, salt, black pepper
instructions: Grill or bake the fish. In a bowl, mix chopped onions, tomatoes, cucumber, and lettuce. Flake the fish and add it to the salad. Drizzle with lemon juice, olive oil, salt, and pepper. Toss well and serve.

recipe_ingredients: Fish, onion, tomato, yogurt, ginger-garlic paste, garam masala, cumin, turmeric, red chili powder, salt, oil
instructions: Marinate fish in yogurt, ginger-garlic paste, and spices. Grill or pan-fry the fish. In a separate pan, cook onions and tomatoes with garam masala. Add water to make a gravy and simmer. Add the grilled fish and cook for a few minutes. Serve with naan or rice.

available_ingredients: Mutton Brain, Blood, Tomato, Onion, Spices, Oil
recipe_ingredients: Mutton brain, tomato, onion, garlic, ginger, green chilies, turmeric, red chili powder, coriander powder, garam masala, curry leaves, salt, oil
instructions: Clean the mutton brain thoroughly. Heat oil in a pan and sauté onions, garlic, and ginger until golden. Add chopped tomatoes and cook until soft. Add turmeric, chili powder, coriander powder, and salt. Stir well and add the cleaned brain. Cook gently, stirring occasionally, until the brain is cooked through. Sprinkle garam masala and serve with rice or roti.

available_ingredients: Mutton Brain, Blood, Tomato, Onion, Tamarind
recipe_ingredients: Mutton brain, mutton blood, tamarind pulp, onion, tomato, garlic, ginger, red chili powder, turmeric, mustard seeds, curry leaves, oil, sal
instructions: Heat oil in a pan and add mustard seeds and curry leaves. Sauté onions, garlic, and ginger. Add tomatoes and cook until soft. Add tamarind pulp and water, bringing to a boil. Add turmeric, chili powder, and salt. Add the mutton brain and blood, and cook until tender. Serve hot with rice.

available_ingredients: Mutton Blood, Tomato, Onion, Curry Leaves
recipe_ingredients: Mutton blood, onion, tomato, garlic, ginger, red chili powder, turmeric, pepper powder, curry leaves, oil, salt
instructions: Heat oil in a pan and sauté curry leaves, garlic, and ginger. Add onions and fry until golden brown. Add chopped tomatoes and cook until the oil separates. Add turmeric, chili powder, and pepper powder. Pour in the mutton blood and stir continuously to prevent clumping. Cook until it becomes dry and crumbly. Serve with rice.

available_ingredients: Mutton Brain, Blood, Tomato, Onion, Pepper
recipe_ingredients: Mutton brain, onion, tomato, black pepper, garlic, ginger, curry leaves, turmeric, fennel powder, salt, oil
instructions: Clean and boil the mutton brain for 5 minutes. Chop it into small pieces. Heat oil in a pan, add curry leaves, garlic, and ginger. Sauté onions until golden, then add tomatoes and cook until mushy. Add turmeric, pepper, and fennel powder. Finally, add the brain pieces and toss gently. Cook for a few minutes and serve hot.

recipe_ingredients: Cabbage, onion, tomato, mustard seeds, green chilies, curry leaves, turmeric, red chili powder, salt, oil
instructions: Heat oil in a pan and add mustard seeds. Once they splutter, add curry leaves and green chilies. Sauté onions until translucent. Add chopped tomatoes and cook until soft. Add turmeric and chili powder. Add finely chopped cabbage and stir well. Cook covered for 10-12 minutes until the cabbage is tender. Serve as a side dish.

recipe_ingredients: Cabbage, onion, tomato, garlic, ginger, turmeric, red chili powder, coriander powder, garam masala, salt, oil
instructions: Heat oil in a pan and add chopped onions. Sauté until golden brown. Add minced garlic and ginger, and cook until fragrant. Add chopped tomatoes and cook until mushy. Add turmeric, chili powder, and coriander powder. Add shredded cabbage and mix well. Cook for 15 minutes until soft. Sprinkle garam masala and serve.

recipe_ingredients: Cooked rice, cabbage, onion, tomato, mustard seeds, curry leaves, turmeric, green chilies, salt, oil
instructions: Heat oil in a pan and add mustard seeds. Once they splutter, add curry leaves, green chilies, and onions. Sauté until golden brown. Add tomatoes and cook until soft. Add shredded cabbage, turmeric, and salt. Cook until cabbage is tender. Mix with cooked rice and serve hot.

recipe_ingredients: Cabbage, onion, tomato, boiled chickpeas, ginger-garlic paste, turmeric, red chili powder, cumin seeds, coriander powder, garam masala, oil, salt
instructions: Heat oil in a pan, add cumin seeds. Sauté onions until golden, then add ginger-garlic paste and cook until fragrant. Add chopped tomatoes and cook until mushy. Add turmeric, chili powder, and coriander powder. Add shredded cabbage and stir. Add boiled chickpeas and cook for 10-12 minutes. Sprinkle garam masala before serving.

recipe_ingredients: Cabbage, onion, tomato, eggs, green chilies, turmeric, red chili powder, coriander leaves, salt, oil
instructions: Heat oil in a pan, sauté chopped onions until golden. Add green chilies and tomatoes. Cook until tomatoes turn mushy. Add shredded cabbage, turmeric, and chili powder. Stir well and cook until the cabbage is tender. Break eggs into the pan and scramble. Cook until eggs are fully done. Garnish with coriander leaves and serve hot.

recipe_ingredients: Brinjal, tomato, onion, tamarind, mustard seeds, curry leaves, garlic, turmeric, red chili powder, coriander powder, salt, oil
instructions: Soak tamarind in warm water and extract the pulp. Heat oil in a pan, add mustard seeds and curry leaves. Sauté chopped onions until golden. Add garlic and cook until fragrant. Add chopped tomatoes and cook until soft. Add brinjal pieces, turmeric, chili powder, and coriander powder. Mix well. Pour in the tamarind pulp, add water, and cook until brinjal is soft. Simmer for 10 minutes and serve with rice.

recipe_ingredients: Brinjal, tomato, onion, mustard seeds, curry leaves, turmeric, red chili powder, salt, oil
instructions: Cut the brinjals into thin slices. Heat oil in a pan, add mustard seeds and curry leaves. Sauté chopped onions until golden. Add chopped tomatoes and cook until mushy. Add turmeric and red chili powder. Add the brinjal slices, mix well, and cook uncovered on low heat until the brinjal is crispy and golden. Serve as a side dish.

recipe_ingredients: Brinjal, tomato, onion, grated coconut, green chilies, turmeric, mustard seeds, curry leaves, salt, oil
instructions: Grind grated coconut with green chilies into a paste. Heat oil in a pan, add mustard seeds and curry leaves. Sauté onions until golden. Add chopped tomatoes and cook until mushy. Add chopped brinjal, turmeric, and salt. Cook until the brinjal is tender. Add the coconut paste and cook for another 5 minutes. Serve with rice or roti.

available_ingredients: Mochai, Coconut, Onion, Tomato, Spices, Oil
recipe_ingredients: Mochai, coconut, onion, tomato, garlic, tamarind, mustard seeds, curry leaves, turmeric, red chili powder, coriander powder, salt, oil
instructions: Soak mochai overnight and cook until tender. Extract tamarind juice. Heat oil in a pan, add mustard seeds and curry leaves. Sauté chopped onions until golden. Add garlic and tomatoes, cook until mushy. Add turmeric, chili powder, and coriander powder. Pour in the tamarind juice and bring to a boil. Add cooked mochai and simmer for 10 minutes. Garnish with coconut paste and cook for another 5 minutes. Serve with rice.

available_ingredients: Mochai, Rice, Onion, Garlic, Spices, Ghee
recipe_ingredients: Mochai, rice, onion, garlic, green chilies, bay leaf, cinnamon, cardamom, cloves, turmeric, garam masala, salt, ghee
instructions: Heat ghee in a pressure cooker. Add bay leaf, cinnamon, cardamom, and cloves. Sauté onions and garlic until golden. Add green chilies and soaked mochai. Add turmeric, garam masala, and salt. Mix well. Add washed rice and water (1:2 ratio). Pressure cook for 2 whistles. Let it rest before fluffing with a fork. Serve with raita.
column5: Heat ghee in a pressure cooker. Add bay leaf, cinnamon, cardamom, and cloves. Sauté onions and garlic until golden. Add green chilies and soaked mochai. Add turmeric, garam masala, and salt. Mix well. Add washed rice and water (1:2 ratio). Pressure cook for 2 whistles. Let it rest before fluffing with a fork. Serve with raita.

available_ingredients: Mochai, Rice, Turmeric, Garlic, Spices, Oil
recipe_ingredients: Cooked rice, boiled mochai, lemon juice, mustard seeds, curry leaves, dry red chilies, turmeric, salt, oil
instructions: Heat oil in a pan, add mustard seeds, curry leaves, and dry red chilies. Add turmeric and boiled mochai. Stir for 2 minutes. Add cooked rice and mix well. Squeeze fresh lemon juice and mix until combined. Serve with papad or pickle.

available_ingredients: Mochai, Raw Banana, Coconut, Onion, Spices, Oil
recipe_ingredients: Mochai, raw banana, grated coconut, green chilies, cumin seeds, mustard seeds, curry leaves, turmeric, salt, oil
instructions: Cook mochai and chopped raw banana in water with turmeric and salt. Grind grated coconut with green chilies and cumin seeds to a fine paste. Heat oil in a pan, add mustard seeds and curry leaves. Add the cooked mochai and banana, then add the coconut paste. Simmer for 5 minutes and serve with rice.

available_ingredients: Spinach, Onion, Tomato, Garlic, Mustard, Oil
recipe_ingredients: Spinach, Onion, Tomato, Garlic, Mustard Seeds, Oil, Salt
instructions: Wash and chop spinach. Heat oil, add mustard seeds and garlic. Sauté onions and tomatoes until soft. Add spinach, salt, and cook until wilted. Serve as a side dish with rice.

available_ingredients: Amaranth Leaves, Coconut, Mustard, Dry Red Chili, Oil
recipe_ingredients: Amaranth Leaves, Grated Coconut, Mustard Seeds, Dry Red Chili, Oil
instructions: Heat oil, add mustard seeds and dry red chilies. Add chopped amaranth leaves. Cook until tender. Add grated coconut and stir well. Serve with rice and sambar.

available_ingredients: Vallarai Keerai, Coconut, Mustard, Onion, Oil
recipe_ingredients: Vallarai Keerai, Coconut, Mustard Seeds, Onion, Oil, Red Chilies, Tamarind
instructions: Heat oil, add mustard seeds, red chilies, and onions. Add vallarai keerai and sauté well. Blend with grated coconut, tamarind, and salt. Serve with dosa or rice.

available_ingredients: Arai Keerai, Toor Dal, Tamarind, Garlic, Oil
recipe_ingredients: Arai Keerai, Toor Dal, Tamarind, Garlic, Mustard Seeds, Oil, Salt
instructions: Boil toor dal and mash it. Cook chopped arai keerai separately. Heat oil, add mustard seeds, garlic, and tamarind extract. Add keerai and dal, mix well, and serve with rice.

available_ingredients: Ponnanganni Keerai, Toor Dal, Onion, Mustard, Oil
recipe_ingredients: Ponnanganni Keerai, Toor Dal, Tamarind, Onion, Mustard Seeds, Oil, Spices
instructions: Cook toor dal until soft. Prepare tamarind water. Heat oil, add mustard seeds and onions. Add keerai and tamarind water. Simmer and serve with rice.

recipe_ingredients: Milk, Badam, Sugar, Cardamom Powder
instructions: Soak the almonds in warm water for a few hours or overnight until the skin peels off easily. Remove the skin and blend the almonds into a smooth paste using a small amount of milk. Boil the remaining milk in a pot, stirring occasionally to prevent it from sticking. Add the almond paste to the boiling milk and mix well. Simmer for a few minutes to blend the flavors. Add sugar to taste and a pinch of cardamom powder for aroma. Continue cooking until the milk thickens slightly. Pour into glasses and serve warm or chilled, garnished with crushed almonds.

recipe_ingredients: Milk, Badam, Sugar, Saffron, Cardamom Powder
instructions: Soak the almonds in warm water, remove the skin, and grind them into a fine paste. Boil the milk in a heavy-bottomed pan, stirring constantly. Add a few strands of saffron soaked in warm milk for color and flavor. Add the almond paste to the milk and stir well. Cook the mixture on low heat until it thickens. Add sugar to taste and stir until dissolved. Sprinkle cardamom powder and mix it evenly. Continue to simmer for a few more minutes, allowing the flavors to combine. Serve the kheer warm or chilled, garnished with chopped almonds.

recipe_ingredients: Milk, Badam, Sugar, Ghee, Cardamom Powder
instructions: Soak the almonds in warm water and peel the skin. Grind them into a coarse paste. Heat ghee in a heavy pan and add the almond paste. Cook the paste on medium heat, stirring constantly, until it turns golden and releases a pleasant aroma. Pour in the milk and continue stirring to prevent lumps. Add sugar and keep stirring until the mixture thickens and leaves the sides of the pan. Add cardamom powder for a fragrant touch. Remove from heat and transfer to a greased plate. Allow it to cool slightly, then cut it into desired shapes or serve it directly.

recipe_ingredients: Milk, Badam, Sugar, Rice, Cardamom Powder
instructions: Rinse the rice thoroughly and soak it for 30 minutes. Soak the almonds in warm water, peel the skin, and blend into a smooth paste. In a large pot, boil the milk, stirring occasionally to prevent it from sticking. Add the soaked rice to the boiling milk and cook on low heat until the rice becomes soft and tender. Stir occasionally to ensure even cooking. Add the almond paste and continue to cook until the mixture thickens. Add sugar and mix well until it dissolves completely. Sprinkle cardamom powder for added flavor. Let the payasam simmer for a few more minutes before serving warm or chilled.

recipe_ingredients: Milk, Badam, Vanilla Ice Cream, Honey
instructions: Soak the almonds in warm water for a couple of hours and peel the skin. Blend the almonds into a smooth paste using a small amount of milk. In a blender, add the remaining milk, almond paste, vanilla ice cream, and honey. Blend the mixture until it becomes smooth and creamy. Adjust the sweetness by adding more honey if desired. Pour the milkshake into glasses and garnish with crushed almonds or a scoop of ice cream on top. Serve chilled for a refreshing drink.

recipe_ingredients: omato, Ginger, Garlic, Mustard Seeds, Red Chili, Oil, Salt
instructions: Heat oil in a pan, add mustard seeds and let them splutter. Add chopped ginger and garlic and sauté until aromatic. Add chopped tomatoes and cook until they soften. Add salt and red chili powder. Cook until the mixture thickens. Let it cool, then blend into a smooth chutney. Serve with dosa, idli, or rice.

recipe_ingredients: Tomato, Ginger, Garlic, Tamarind, Black Pepper, Cumin, Coriander, Mustard Seeds
instructions: Soak tamarind in warm water and extract the juice. Crush garlic, ginger, black pepper, and cumin coarsely. Heat oil in a pot, add mustard seeds and curry leaves. Add chopped tomatoes and sauté until mushy. Add tamarind juice and the crushed spices. Simmer for 10 minutes. Garnish with coriander leaves and serve hot with rice.

recipe_ingredients: Tomato, Ginger, Garlic, Fish, Turmeric, Tamarind, Curry Leaves
instructions: Clean the fish and marinate it with turmeric and salt. Heat oil in a pan, add mustard seeds, curry leaves, chopped ginger, and garlic. Add chopped tomatoes and cook until soft. Add tamarind extract, salt, and water. Let it boil. Add fish pieces and cook until tender. Serve hot with rice.

available_ingredients: Egg, Mushroom, Onion, Tomato, Spices, Oil
recipe_ingredients: Egg, Mushroom, Onion, Tomato, Ginger, Garlic, Turmeric, Garam Masala, Coriander, Salt, Oil
instructions: Heat oil in a pan, sauté chopped onions, ginger, and garlic until golden brown. Add chopped tomatoes and cook until soft. Add turmeric, garam masala, and salt. Stir well. Add sliced mushrooms and cook until tender. Crack eggs into the curry and gently mix. Cover and cook until the eggs are set. Garnish with coriander leaves and serve with rice or roti.

available_ingredients: gg, Mushroom, Butter, Cheese, Milk, Pepper
recipe_ingredients: Egg, Mushroom, Butter, Cheese, Milk, Pepper, Salt, Parsley
instructions: Beat the eggs in a bowl and add a splash of milk. Heat butter in a pan, add sliced mushrooms and sauté until golden. Pour the egg mixture over the mushrooms. Cook until the bottom is set, then sprinkle grated cheese and cover until the cheese melts. Sprinkle pepper and chopped parsley. Serve hot.

recipe_ingredients: Egg, Mushroom, Milk, Flour, Butter, Cheese, Onion, Pepper, Salt
instructions: Preheat the oven. Sauté sliced mushrooms and onions in butter until soft. In a bowl, whisk eggs, milk, salt, and pepper. In a greased baking dish, spread the mushrooms and onions. Pour the egg mixture over it and sprinkle grated cheese. Bake until the quiche is golden and set. Serve warm.

available_ingredients: Egg, Mushroom, Bell Pepper, Cheese, Flour
recipe_ingredients: Egg, Mushroom, Bell Pepper, Mozzarella Cheese, Pizza Dough, Tomato Sauce, Olive Oil, Oregano
instructions: Preheat the oven. Roll out the pizza dough and spread tomato sauce over it. Heat oil in a pan, sauté sliced mushrooms and bell peppers. Spread them on the pizza dough. Crack an egg on top and sprinkle shredded cheese. Bake until the crust is golden and the egg is cooked. Sprinkle oregano before serving.

recipe_ingredients: Egg, Mushroom, Bread, Butter, Cream, Garlic, Salt, Pepper
instructions: Heat butter in a pan, sauté chopped garlic and sliced mushrooms until golden brown. Add cream and cook until it thickens. Season with salt and pepper. In a separate pan, fry eggs to your preference. Toast the bread slices and spread the creamy mushroom sauce over them. Top with the fried eggs. Serve warm.

available_ingredients: Egg, Mushroom, Rice, Soy Sauce, Garlic, Onion
recipe_ingredients: Egg, Mushroom, Cooked Rice, Soy Sauce, Garlic, Onion, Pepper, Spring Onion
instructions: Heat oil in a wok, add chopped garlic and onions. Sauté until golden. Add sliced mushrooms and cook until they soften. Push them to one side and scramble the eggs on the other side. Mix everything together, then add the cooked rice. Pour soy sauce, add pepper, and stir-fry on high heat. Garnish with chopped spring onions and serve hot.

recipe_ingredients: Wheat Flour, Salt, Water, Oil (optional)
instructions: Mix wheat flour, salt, and water to form a smooth dough. Divide into balls, roll them into circles, and cook on a hot tawa until golden brown. Flip and cook on both sides. Serve with curry or vegetables.

recipe_ingredients: Wheat Flour, Salt, Water, Oil
instructions: Mix wheat flour and salt. Add water gradually and knead to form a stiff dough. Divide into small balls, roll into circles, and deep fry in hot oil until golden and puffed. Serve hot.

recipe_ingredients: Wheat Flour, Salt, Water
instructions: Knead wheat flour and salt with water to make a soft dough. Roll into thin circles. Cook on a hot tawa, then directly on the flame until it puffs up. Serve warm.

recipe_ingredients: Wheat Flour, Salt, Water, Ghee
instructions: Make dough with wheat flour, salt, and water. Roll it out, spread ghee, and fold into layers. Roll again and cook on a hot tawa with ghee until golden brown and crisp.

recipe_ingredients: Wheat Flour, Salt, Jaggery, Ghee, Water
instructions: Roast wheat flour in ghee until aromatic. Add water and cook while stirring. Mix in jaggery and cook until thick. Serve warm garnished with nuts.

recipe_ingredients: Wheat Flour, Salt, Curd, Water, Cumin Seeds
instructions: Mix wheat flour, salt, curd, and water to form a thin batter. Add cumin seeds. Pour onto a hot greased tawa and spread into a thin circle. Cook until golden brown on both sides. Serve with chutney.

recipe_ingredients: Wheat Flour, Salt, Fenugreek Leaves, Turmeric, Red Chili Powder, Oil
instructions: Mix wheat flour with salt, turmeric, red chili powder, and chopped fenugreek leaves. Add water and knead to a soft dough. Roll into thin circles and cook on a tawa with oil until golden brown. Serve with pickle or curd.

recipe_ingredients: Cooked Rice, Curd, Onion, Curry Leaves, Mustard Seeds, Green Chilies, Ginger, Salt, Oil
instructions: Cook rice and let it cool. Mix curd and salt with the rice. In a pan, heat oil, add mustard seeds, chopped onions, green chilies, ginger, and curry leaves. Sauté and pour the mixture over the curd rice. Mix well and serve.

available_ingredients: Curd, Onion, Curry Leaves, Coconut, Green Chilies
recipe_ingredients: Coconut, Green Chilies, Curd, Onion, Curry Leaves, Mustard Seeds, Salt
instructions: Grate fresh coconut and grind it with green chilies into a smooth paste using water. In a bowl, whisk curd until it becomes creamy. Add the coconut paste to the curd and mix well. Heat oil in a pan, add mustard seeds and let them splutter. Add curry leaves and finely chopped onions. Sauté the onions until they become translucent. Lower the flame and pour in the curd-coconut mixture. Stir continuously to prevent curdling. Simmer on low heat for about 5-10 minutes. Add salt to taste. Serve warm with steamed rice.

available_ingredients: Curd, Onion, Curry Leaves, Chickpea Flour
recipe_ingredients: Chickpea Flour, Curd, Onion, Curry Leaves, Mustard Seeds, Green Chilies, Turmeric, Salt
instructions: Prepare a thick batter using chickpea flour, water, salt, and a pinch of turmeric. Fry spoonfuls of this batter in oil to make pakoras and set them aside. In a separate bowl, whisk curd with water, adding turmeric, salt, and chickpea flour to create a smooth mixture. Heat oil in a pan, add mustard seeds, curry leaves, green chilies, and chopped onions. Sauté until fragrant. Slowly pour the curd mixture into the pan, stirring constantly to avoid lumps. Let the kadhi cook on low flame until it thickens. Add the pakoras to the kadhi and let them soak for a few minutes. Garnish with fresh coriander leaves and serve with rice.

available_ingredients: Curd, Onion, Curry Leaves, Ginger, Garlic
recipe_ingredients: Ginger, Garlic, Curd, Onion, Curry Leaves, Mustard Seeds, Turmeric, Green Chilies
instructions: Finely chop the ginger and garlic. Heat oil in a pan, add mustard seeds, and let them splutter. Add curry leaves, chopped onions, ginger, and garlic. Sauté until golden and fragrant. Add turmeric and mix well. Lower the flame and slowly add whisked curd. Stir continuously to avoid curdling. Allow the curry to simmer for 5-10 minutes until it thickens. Add salt as per taste. Garnish with fresh coriander leaves and serve hot.

recipe_ingredients: Spinach, Curd, Onion, Curry Leaves, Mustard Seeds, Green Chilies, Coconut, Turmeric
instructions: Clean and finely chop the spinach leaves. Boil them in water until tender and set aside. Grind coconut and green chilies into a fine paste. In a bowl, whisk curd until smooth. Heat oil in a pan, add mustard seeds, and let them pop. Add curry leaves and chopped onions, sautéing until golden brown. Add the cooked spinach, followed by the coconut paste. Pour in the whisked curd and mix well. Simmer the mixture on low heat, stirring occasionally to prevent curdling. Adjust salt to taste. Serve with hot rice.

recipe_ingredients: Eggplant, Curd, Onion, Curry Leaves, Mustard Seeds, Green Chilies, Turmeric
instructions: Slice the eggplant into thin rounds and fry until golden brown. Set aside. Heat oil in a pan and add mustard seeds. Once they crackle, add curry leaves and finely chopped onions. Sauté until the onions are golden. Add slit green chilies and turmeric. Lower the flame and add whisked curd, stirring gently. Allow the curry to simmer for a few minutes. Add the fried brinjal slices and let them absorb the flavors. Adjust salt as needed. Garnish with coriander leaves. Serve hot with rice or roti.

available_ingredients: Carrot, Milk, Cocoa Powder, Sugar, Ghee
recipe_ingredients: Carrot, Milk, Cocoa Powder, Sugar, Ghee, Cardamom Powder, Cashews, Almonds
instructions: Grate the carrots and set them aside. Heat ghee in a pan, add the grated carrots, and sauté for about 5 minutes until they soften. Pour in the milk and let it cook on medium flame, stirring occasionally, until the milk reduces and thickens. Add sugar and mix well. Add cocoa powder and stir continuously to combine. Cook for a few more minutes until the mixture leaves the sides of the pan. Sprinkle cardamom powder for aroma. Garnish with roasted cashews and almonds. Serve warm.

available_ingredients: Carrot, Milk, Cocoa Powder, Sugar, Flour
recipe_ingredients: Carrot, Milk, Cocoa Powder, Sugar, Flour, Baking Powder, Oil, Vanilla Extract
instructions: Preheat the oven to 180°C (350°F). Grease a cake tin. In a large bowl, mix grated carrots, milk, sugar, and oil. In another bowl, combine flour, cocoa powder, and baking powder. Gradually add the dry ingredients to the wet mixture. Stir well until smooth. Add vanilla extract for flavor. Pour the batter into the greased tin. Bake for 35-40 minutes until a toothpick inserted comes out clean. Let it cool before serving.

recipe_ingredients: Carrot, Milk, Cocoa Powder, Honey, Ice Cubes, Cinnamon Powder (Optional)
instructions: Peel and chop the carrots. Boil or steam them until soft. Let them cool. In a blender, add the boiled carrots, milk, cocoa powder, honey, and ice cubes. Blend until smooth and creamy. Adjust the sweetness by adding more honey if needed. Optionally, sprinkle a pinch of cinnamon powder for a rich flavor. Serve chilled.

recipe_ingredients: Carrot, Milk, Cocoa Powder, Oats, Honey, Chia Seeds (Optional)
instructions: Grate the carrots and set aside. In a pot, heat milk and bring it to a boil. Add the oats and grated carrots. Stir continuously and cook for about 10 minutes until the oats are soft. Add cocoa powder and mix well. Sweeten with honey. Optionally, sprinkle chia seeds for added texture. Serve warm for breakfast.

recipe_ingredients: Apple, Vanilla Ice Cream, Honey, Cinnamon Powder, Almonds (Optional)
instructions: Wash, peel, and slice the apple thinly. Heat a small pan and sauté the apple slices until slightly golden. Sprinkle cinnamon powder and drizzle honey over them. Cook for a few more minutes. Serve the warm caramelized apples over scoops of vanilla ice cream. Optionally, top with chopped almonds or nuts. Enjoy immediately.

recipe_ingredients: Apple, Vanilla Ice Cream, Honey, Milk, Ice Cubes
instructions: Core and chop the apple into small pieces. In a blender, add the apple, milk, honey, and ice cream. Blend until smooth. Add ice cubes for a chilled texture. Adjust the sweetness with honey if needed. Pour into a glass and serve with a sprinkle of cinnamon on top.

available_ingredients: Apple, Ice Cream, Honey, Cream Cheese
recipe_ingredients: Apple, Honey, Ice Cream, Cream Cheese, Bread
instructions: Slice the apple thinly. Toast two slices of bread. Spread cream cheese on one slice. Place apple slices on top, drizzle honey, and add a scoop of ice cream. Cover with the second slice of bread. Serve as a delicious cold sandwich.

recipe_ingredients: Apple, Ice Cream, Honey, Oats, Butter, Brown Sugar
instructions: Preheat the oven to 180°C (350°F). Slice the apple and mix it with honey and a pinch of cinnamon. In a separate bowl, combine oats, brown sugar, and melted butter to make a crumbly mixture. Place the apple slices in a baking dish and cover with the oat mixture. Bake for 20-25 minutes until golden brown. Serve warm with ice cream on top.

available_ingredients: Wheat flour, Jaggery, Ghee, Fennel seeds
recipe_ingredients: Wheat flour, jaggery, ghee, fennel seeds, cardamom powder, water
instructions: In a large bowl, mix wheat flour, jaggery, fennel seeds, and cardamom powder. Add ghee and mix well to form a crumbly texture. Gradually add water to knead into a stiff dough. Shape into small discs using molds. Deep-fry in hot oil until golden brown. Allow them to cool and serve.

recipe_ingredients: Rice, chana dal, cumin seeds, green chilies, ginger, salt, oil
instructions: Soak rice and chana dal overnight. Blend into a smooth batter with cumin seeds, green chilies, and ginger. Add salt and mix well. Heat oil in a pan, pour a ladle of batter, and fry until golden on both sides. Serve with chutney or aloo curry.

available_ingredients: Rugra mushrooms, Mustard seeds, Spices, Oil
recipe_ingredients: Rugra mushrooms, mustard seeds, onions, tomatoes, turmeric powder, cumin powder, oil, salt, water
instructions: Clean and boil the Rugra mushrooms. Heat oil in a pan, add mustard seeds, and sauté onions until golden. Add tomatoes, turmeric, and cumin powder, cooking until the tomatoes soften. Add boiled Rugra mushrooms and cook for 10-15 minutes. Garnish and serve with rice.

available_ingredients: Wheat flour, Sattu, Mustard oil, Spices, Vegetables
recipe_ingredients: Wheat flour, sattu, mustard oil, ginger, garlic, green chilies, lemon juice, salt, eggplant, tomatoes, potatoes
instructions: Prepare the stuffing by mixing sattu with mustard oil, green chilies, ginger, garlic, lemon juice, and salt. Knead wheat flour with water to make a dough. Stuff the dough balls with sattu mixture and bake until golden. Roast eggplant, tomatoes, and potatoes, mash with mustard oil and spices to make chokha. Serve with litti.

recipe_ingredients: Rice flour, salt, water, oil
instructions: Boil water and add salt. Gradually add rice flour while stirring to avoid lumps. Cook until the mixture thickens. Let it cool slightly, then knead into a smooth dough. Shape into thin rotis and cook on a tawa with oil until golden. Serve with chutney or curry.

available_ingredients: Rice, Curd, Mustard seeds, Green chilies, Curry leaves
recipe_ingredients: Cooked rice, water, curd, mustard seeds, green chilies, curry leaves
instructions: Cook rice and allow it to cool completely. Add water and let it ferment for 2-3 days in a clay pot. Once fermented, strain the liquid and serve it chilled. You can season it with mustard seeds, green chilies, and curry leaves for added flavor. Handia is traditionally enjoyed as a refreshing drink.

recipe_ingredients: Rice flour, chana dal, salt, turmeric powder, ginger, cumin seeds, ghee
instructions: Soak chana dal for a few hours and grind it into a coarse paste. Add turmeric powder, salt, grated ginger, and cumin seeds. Prepare rice flour dough by boiling water and mixing it with the flour to form a soft dough. Flatten small portions of the dough, fill with the chana dal mixture, and seal the edges. Steam the pithas for 20-25 minutes. Serve hot with green chutney or curry.

available_ingredients: Rice, Green Vegetables, Garlic, Mustard oil, Spices
recipe_ingredients: Marua (finger millet) flour, water, salt, mustard oil
instructions: Take marua flour in a bowl and add a pinch of salt. Gradually add water to form a soft, pliable dough. Divide the dough into small balls and flatten into round rotis using your hands. Heat a tawa (griddle) and cook the rotis on both sides until golden brown. Brush with mustard oil for an authentic flavor. Serve with vegetable curry or chutney.

recipe_ingredients: Boiled potatoes, mustard oil, green chilies, salt, tamarind
instructions: Boil potatoes until tender, then peel and mash them. Heat mustard oil in a pan, add green chilies for a spicy kick, and pour it over the mashed potatoes. Mix in tamarind pulp, salt, and additional mustard oil for extra flavor. Serve as a side dish with rice and dal.

available_ingredients: Rice, Lentils, Vegetables, Garlic, Mustard oil, Spices
recipe_ingredients: Besan (gram flour), yogurt, mustard seeds, curry leaves, garlic, turmeric, red chili powder, salt
instructions: In a bowl, mix besan with yogurt, water, and turmeric to form a smooth kadhi mixture. Make a thick paste using besan, salt, and water to create small dumplings. Fry these dumplings until golden brown. In a pot, add mustard seeds, curry leaves, and garlic to temper the kadhi. Add the kadhi mixture and bring it to a boil. Add the fried dumplings and simmer until cooked. Serve with rice.

available_ingredients: Pumpkin, Mustard seeds, Spices, Mustard oil
recipe_ingredients: Pumpkin, mustard seeds, turmeric, cumin seeds, red chilies, mustard oil, salt
instructions: Peel and chop the pumpkin into small cubes. Heat mustard oil in a pan until it reaches a smoking point. Reduce the heat and add mustard seeds, cumin seeds, and dried red chilies. Once they splutter, add the chopped pumpkin. Season with turmeric powder and salt. Cover and cook until the pumpkin becomes tender. Mash lightly for a creamy texture. Serve with rice or roti.

recipe_ingredients: Rice flour, jaggery, grated coconut, cardamom powder, water, ghee
instructions: Soak rice for a few hours and grind it into a fine flour. Dissolve jaggery in water and add it to the rice flour to make a smooth batter. Mix grated coconut and cardamom powder for added flavor. Heat a pan with ghee and pour the batter to form small round discs. Cook on low heat until golden brown on both sides. Serve as a dessert or snack.

available_ingredients: Rice, Black Gram (Urad Dal), Garlic, Mustard Oil, Spices
recipe_ingredients: Rice, black gram, garlic, green chilies, ginger, mustard oil, salt
instructions: Soak rice and black gram overnight. Grind into a thick batter, adding garlic, green chilies, and ginger. Heat mustard oil in a pan. Shape the batter into small discs and deep-fry until golden brown. Serve with chutney or curry.

recipe_ingredients: Raw jackfruit, mustard seeds, turmeric powder, red chili powder, mustard oil, salt
instructions: Peel and chop the jackfruit into bite-sized pieces. Boil it until slightly tender. Heat mustard oil in a pan, add mustard seeds, and let them splutter. Add the boiled jackfruit and sauté with turmeric powder, red chili powder, and salt. Cook until the jackfruit is golden brown. Serve with rice.

recipe_ingredients: Rice flour, jaggery, milk, grated coconut, fennel seeds, ghee
instructions: Prepare a smooth batter using rice flour, jaggery, milk, and grated coconut. Add fennel seeds for aroma. Heat ghee in a pan. Pour small ladles of the batter into the ghee and deep-fry until golden brown. Drain and serve as a dessert.

available_ingredients: Mutton, Yogurt, Mustard Oil, Spices, Ginger, Garlic
recipe_ingredients: Mutton, mustard oil, yogurt, ginger, garlic, red chili powder, fennel powder, bay leaves, cardamom
instructions: Heat mustard oil in a pot, add bay leaves, cardamom, and ginger-garlic paste. Add mutton and cook until browned. Whisk yogurt and add to the pot along with red chili powder, fennel powder, and salt. Cook on low heat until the mutton is tender. Serve with rice.

recipe_ingredients: Fresh spinach, mustard oil, dried red chilies, garlic, asafoetida, salt
instructions: Heat mustard oil in a pot. Add dried red chilies, garlic, and a pinch of asafoetida. Add spinach leaves and stir well. Cover and cook on low heat until the leaves are tender. Serve with steamed rice.

recipe_ingredients: Basmati rice, mutton, saffron, yogurt, bay leaves, cloves, cardamom, cinnamon, ghee
instructions: Boil mutton with whole spices to create a broth. Fry onions in ghee, add the mutton and yogurt. Cook for a few minutes, then add rice and saffron-infused milk. Pour in the broth and cook until the rice is fluffy. Serve with raita.

recipe_ingredients: Paneer, turmeric, mustard oil, milk, fennel powder, ginger powder
instructions: Fry paneer cubes until golden. In a pan, heat mustard oil and add fennel powder, ginger powder, and turmeric. Add milk and let it boil. Add the fried paneer cubes and cook until the gravy thickens. Serve hot.

recipe_ingredients: Minced lamb, yogurt, ginger, garlic, cardamom, bay leaves, fennel powder
instructions: Mix minced lamb with spices and shape into large meatballs. Cook the meatballs in a spiced yogurt sauce. Serve with rice.

available_ingredients: Rice, Ghee, Sugar, Saffron, Dry Fruits
recipe_ingredients: Basmati rice, sugar, saffron, cardamom, almonds, cashews, raisins, ghee
instructions: Soak saffron in warm milk. Cook rice in ghee, then add sugar, saffron milk, and dry fruits. Cover and cook until rice is fluffy. Serve as a sweet delicacy.

recipe_ingredients: Turnips, mustard oil, dried red chilies, asafoetida, ginger powder, fennel powder
instructions: Peel and chop turnips. Heat mustard oil, add red chilies and asafoetida. Add turnips, ginger powder, and fennel powder. Cook until turnips are tender. Serve as a side dish.

recipe_ingredients: Baby potatoes, curd, ginger powder, fennel powder, cardamom, cloves, mustard oil
instructions: Boil and peel potatoes. Fry them until golden brown. Prepare a yogurt-based gravy with mustard oil, ginger powder, fennel powder, and other spices. Add the potatoes and cook on low heat until tender.

recipe_ingredients: Lotus stems, besan (gram flour), rice flour, carom seeds, turmeric powder, salt, mustard oil
instructions: Clean and slice the lotus stems. Make a thick batter using besan, rice flour, carom seeds, and turmeric. Dip the lotus stem slices into the batter and deep-fry in mustard oil until crispy. Serve as a snack.

recipe_ingredients: Wheat flour, jaggery, ghee, fennel seeds, milk
instructions: Mix wheat flour, jaggery, and fennel seeds with warm milk to make a dough. Flatten the dough into round shapes. Fry in ghee until golden brown. Serve as a festive treat.

recipe_ingredients: Minced mutton, yogurt, ginger, garlic, fennel powder, cardamom, saffron, mustard oil
instructions: Make meatballs using minced mutton, ginger, and garlic. Cook in a saffron-infused yogurt gravy with fennel powder and cardamom. Serve with rice.

recipe_ingredients: Mutton, rice, saffron, yogurt, cardamom, cloves, ghee, ginger, garlic
instructions: Wazwan is a traditional multi-course meal. It includes dishes like Rogan Josh, Yakhni, and Rista. Prepare each dish with the finest spices and serve with saffron rice.

available_ingredients: Basmati Rice, Ghee, Turmeric, Ginger, Green Chilies, Cumin, Asafoetida, Water, Salt
recipe_ingredients: Gahat (Horse Gram) - 1 cup, Rice - 1 cup, Ghee - 2 tbsp, Turmeric - ½ tsp, Ginger - 1 inch, Green Chilies - 2, Cumin Seeds - 1 tsp, Asafoetida - a pinch, Salt - to taste, Water - 4 cups
instructions: Soak horse gram overnight. Cook the soaked horse gram in a pressure cooker until soft. In a large pot, heat ghee, add cumin, asafoetida, ginger, and green chilies. Add turmeric and stir for a few seconds. Add rice and cooked horse gram. Pour in water, add salt, and let it cook on a low flame until the rice is tender. Stir occasionally. Serve hot with ghee and yogurt.

available_ingredients: Chickpea Flour, Mustard Oil, Cumin, Turmeric, Asafoetida, Salt, Coriander
recipe_ingredients: Chickpea Flour - 1 cup, Mustard Oil - 2 tbsp, Cumin Seeds - 1 tsp, Turmeric Powder - ½ tsp, Asafoetida - a pinch, Salt - to taste, Coriander - for garnish
instructions: Heat mustard oil in a pan. Add cumin seeds, asafoetida, and turmeric powder. Add chickpea flour and roast until golden brown. Add water and stir to avoid lumps. Simmer for 15-20 minutes, ensuring the gravy thickens. Garnish with coriander. This dish pairs well with rice or roti.

recipe_ingredients: Barley Flour - 1 cup, Jaggery - ½ cup, Ghee - 2 tbsp, Water - as required
instructions: Mix barley flour and water to make a dough. Divide the dough into two parts. Prepare a filling with jaggery and ghee. Stuff the filling into the dough and roll into a thick roti. Cook on a griddle with ghee until golden brown. Serve warm as a nutritious breakfast.

available_ingredients: Red Rice, Buttermilk, Mustard Seeds, Curry Leaves, Green Chilies, Turmeric, Salt, Coriander
recipe_ingredients: Red Rice - 1 cup, Buttermilk - 2 cups, Mustard Seeds - 1 tsp, Curry Leaves - 6-8, Green Chilies - 2, Turmeric Powder - ½ tsp, Salt - to taste, Coriander - for garnish
instructions: Cook rice and set aside. In a pot, heat mustard seeds and curry leaves. Add green chilies and turmeric. Pour in buttermilk and stir well. Simmer for 10 minutes, ensuring it doesn't curdle. Add cooked rice and mix. Garnish with fresh coriander and serve. Jholi is a comforting, tangy dish served with rice or roti.

available_ingredients: Rice Flour, Jaggery, Ghee, Milk, Cardamom Powder, Grated Coconut
recipe_ingredients: Wheat Flour - 1 cup, Jaggery - ½ cup, Milk - ½ cup, Cardamom Powder - ½ tsp, Grated Coconut - 2 tbsp, Ghee - for frying
instructions: Dissolve jaggery in milk and mix with wheat flour to form a thick batter. Add cardamom powder and grated coconut. Heat ghee in a deep pan. Drop spoonfuls of batter into the ghee and fry until golden brown. Gulgulas are crispy on the outside and soft on the inside, often enjoyed as a tea-time snack.

available_ingredients: Wheat Flour, Yogurt, Sugar, Cardamom Powder, Ghee
recipe_ingredients: Wheat Flour - 1 cup, Yogurt - ½ cup, Sugar - ½ cup, Cardamom Powder - ½ tsp, Ghee - for frying
instructions: Mix wheat flour, yogurt, sugar, and cardamom powder to form a thick batter. Allow it to ferment for 4-5 hours. Heat ghee in a deep pan. Pour the batter in the shape of spirals (like jalebi) and fry until golden brown. Serve warm as a delightful breakfast or festive treat.

available_ingredients: Black Gram, Ghee, Cumin, Asafoetida, Ginger, Green Chilies, Turmeric, Salt, Water
recipe_ingredients: Spinach - 2 cups, Fenugreek Leaves - 1 cup, Ginger - 1 inch, Green Chilies - 2, Ghee - 2 tbsp, Cumin Seeds - 1 tsp, Asafoetida - a pinch, Turmeric - ½ tsp, Rice Flour - 1 tbsp, Salt - to taste, Water - 1 cup
instructions: Blanch the spinach and fenugreek leaves, then blend into a smooth paste. Heat ghee in a pan, add cumin seeds, asafoetida, ginger, and green chilies. Stir in the spinach paste. Mix rice flour with water to make a slurry and add to the spinach. Cook until the mixture thickens. Season with salt and serve with steamed rice.

recipe_ingredients: Wheat Flour - 1 cup, Jaggery - ½ cup, Ghee - 3 tbsp, Water - as required
instructions: Melt jaggery in water to create a syrup. Allow it to cool. Mix the syrup with wheat flour to make a smooth batter. Heat ghee in a deep pan. Pour small portions of the batter into the oil and fry until golden brown. Drain excess oil and let them cool. Arsa is a traditional sweet prepared during festivals and special occasions.

available_ingredients: Pork, Bamboo Shoots, Ginger, Garlic, Turmeric, Salt, Mustard Oil, Green Chilies
recipe_ingredients: Pork - 500g, Rice - 2 cups, Bamboo Shoots - ½ cup, Ginger - 1 inch, Garlic - 5 cloves, Turmeric - ½ tsp, Salt - to taste, Mustard Oil - 3 tbsp, Green Chilies - 3
instructions: Wash rice and set aside. Boil pork with salt, turmeric, and water until tender. Heat mustard oil in a pan, add chopped ginger, garlic, and green chilies. Add bamboo shoots and sauté until fragrant. Mix in the rice and pork. Add water and cook until the rice is done. Stir occasionally. Serve hot with a side of fresh vegetables or pickles.

available_ingredients: Rice Flour, Grated Coconut, Jaggery, Banana Leaves
recipe_ingredients: Rice Flour - 2 cups, Jaggery - 1 cup, Grated Coconut - ½ cup, Banana Leaves - for steaming
instructions: Dissolve jaggery in water to create a syrup. Mix rice flour and grated coconut in a bowl. Add the jaggery syrup and knead into a dough. Shape small patties from the dough. Wrap them in banana leaves and steam for about 30 minutes. Serve warm as a sweet delicacy.

available_ingredients: Pork, Fermented Soybeans (Tungrymbai), Ginger, Garlic, Turmeric, Mustard Oil, Salt, Green Chilies
recipe_ingredients: Fermented Soybeans - 1 cup, Pork - 300g, Ginger - 1 inch, Garlic - 6 cloves, Turmeric - ½ tsp, Salt - to taste, Mustard Oil - 3 tbsp, Green Chilies - 3
instructions: Heat mustard oil in a pan, add crushed garlic, ginger, and green chilies. Add turmeric and sauté until fragrant. Add pork pieces and stir-fry until browned. Add fermented soybeans and mix well. Cook on low flame, stirring occasionally, until the dish is well combined. Serve with steamed rice.

available_ingredients: Rice, Pork, Mustard Greens, Ginger, Garlic, Salt, Turmeric, Mustard Oil
recipe_ingredients: Pork - 500g, Mustard Greens - 1 bunch, Rice - 1 cup, Ginger - 1 inch, Garlic - 5 cloves, Salt - to taste, Turmeric - ½ tsp, Mustard Oil - 3 tbsp
instructions: Boil the pork with turmeric and salt until cooked. Finely chop mustard greens. Heat mustard oil in a pan, add garlic and ginger. Stir in the mustard greens and cook until soft. Shred the boiled pork and mix it with the greens. Serve with rice and chutney.

available_ingredients: Rice, Black Sesame Seeds, Ginger, Green Chilies, Garlic, Salt, Water
recipe_ingredients: Rice - 1 cup, Black Sesame Seeds - 2 tbsp, Ginger - 1 inch, Garlic - 5 cloves, Green Chilies - 2, Salt - to taste, Water - 4 cups
instructions: Cook rice until soft. In a separate pan, dry roast black sesame seeds and grind into a paste. Heat water and add the sesame paste. Add chopped ginger, garlic, and green chilies. Simmer for 10 minutes. Add the cooked rice and stir well. Adjust salt and serve hot.

available_ingredients: Pork, Fermented Bamboo Shoots, Ginger, Garlic, Green Chilies, Salt, Turmeric, Mustard Oil
recipe_ingredients: Pork - 500g, Fermented Bamboo Shoots - ½ cup, Ginger - 1 inch, Garlic - 5 cloves, Green Chilies - 3, Turmeric - ½ tsp, Salt - to taste, Mustard Oil - 3 tbsp
instructions: Heat mustard oil in a pan. Add chopped garlic, ginger, and green chilies. Add turmeric and stir. Add pork and cook until browned. Add fermented bamboo shoots and mix well. Pour in water, cover, and cook on low flame until the pork is tender. Serve with steamed rice.

available_ingredients: Fish, Rice Powder, Turmeric, Ginger, Garlic, Green Chilies, Salt, Mustard Oil
recipe_ingredients: Dry Fish - 300g, Rice Powder - 2 tbsp, Turmeric - ½ tsp, Ginger - 1 inch, Garlic - 5 cloves, Green Chilies - 3, Salt - to taste, Mustard Oil - 2 tbsp
instructions: Soak dry fish in water for 30 minutes. Boil with turmeric and salt. In a separate pan, heat mustard oil and sauté garlic, ginger, and chilies. Add the boiled fish and cook for 5 minutes. Add rice powder mixed with water to thicken the broth. Simmer for 10 more minutes. Serve hot.

available_ingredients: Rice Flour, Buttermilk, Jaggery, Water, Banana Leaves
recipe_ingredients: Rice Flour - 2 cups, Buttermilk - 1 cup, Jaggery - ½ cup, Water - as required, Banana Leaves - for steaming
instructions: Mix rice flour with buttermilk and jaggery to form a thick batter. Pour the batter into banana leaves and fold them tightly. Steam for 20-30 minutes until firm. Serve as a traditional sweet dish during festivals.

available_ingredients: Rice, Pumpkin, Sesame Seeds, Green Chilies, Salt, Water
recipe_ingredients: Pumpkin - 500g, Sesame Seeds - 3 tbsp, Green Chilies - 3, Salt - to taste, Water - 2 cups
instructions: Peel and cube the pumpkin. Boil it with water, salt, and green chilies until soft. In a separate pan, roast the sesame seeds until golden brown and grind into a paste. Mix the paste into the boiled pumpkin. Simmer for 5-10 minutes. Serve with rice.

available_ingredients: Vallarai Keerai, Coconut, Mustard, Onion, Oil
recipe_ingredients: Black Lentils - 1 cup, Fermented Bamboo Shoots - ½ cup, Ginger - 1 inch, Garlic - 5 cloves, Green Chilies - 3, Turmeric - ½ tsp, Salt - to taste, Mustard Oil - 2 tbsp
instructions: Soak black lentils overnight. Boil with turmeric and salt until soft. Heat mustard oil in a pan, add chopped garlic, ginger, and chilies. Add fermented bamboo shoots and stir. Mix in the boiled lentils and simmer for 10 minutes. Serve warm.

available_ingredients: Rice, Corn, Mustard Greens, Ginger, Garlic, Salt, Mustard Oil
recipe_ingredients: Rice - 1 cup, Corn - 1 cup, Mustard Greens - 1 bunch, Ginger - 1 inch, Garlic - 5 cloves, Salt - to taste, Mustard Oil - 2 tbsp
instructions: Cook rice and corn together until done. Heat mustard oil, add chopped garlic and ginger. Sauté until fragrant. Add chopped mustard greens and stir until wilted. Mix with the rice and corn. Adjust salt and serve.

available_ingredients: Pork, Black Sesame Seeds, Ginger, Garlic, Green Chilies, Salt, Turmeric, Mustard Oil
recipe_ingredients: Pork - 500g, Black Sesame Seeds - 3 tbsp, Ginger - 1 inch, Garlic - 6 cloves, Green Chilies - 3, Salt - to taste, Turmeric - ½ tsp, Mustard Oil - 3 tbsp
instructions: Roast black sesame seeds and grind into a paste. Heat mustard oil, add garlic, ginger, and chilies. Fry until aromatic. Add pork and cook until browned. Add turmeric and salt. Pour water and let it simmer until pork is tender. Add sesame paste and cook for another 10 minutes. Serve with rice.

available_ingredients: Sticky Rice, Banana Leaves, Grated Coconut, Jaggery, Cardamom Powder
recipe_ingredients: Sticky Rice - 2 cups, Banana Leaves - for wrapping, Grated Coconut - 1 cup, Jaggery - ½ cup, Cardamom Powder - ½ tsp
instructions: Soak sticky rice for 2 hours. Mix grated coconut, jaggery, and cardamom powder. Wrap small portions of the mixture with the rice in banana leaves. Steam for 30 minutes. Serve as a sweet delicacy.

available_ingredients: Potatoes, Dry Fish, Fermented Bamboo Shoots, Ginger, Garlic, Green Chilies, Salt, Mustard Oil
recipe_ingredients: Potatoes - 4, Dry Fish - 150g, Fermented Bamboo Shoots - ½ cup, Ginger - 1 inch, Garlic - 5 cloves, Green Chilies - 3, Salt - to taste, Mustard Oil - 3 tbsp
instructions: Boil potatoes until soft and mash them. Soak dry fish in water for 30 minutes, then fry until crispy. Heat mustard oil, add ginger, garlic, and chilies. Add fermented bamboo shoots and stir. Add mashed potatoes and dry fish, then mix well. Serve as a side dish.

available_ingredients: Wild Greens, Rice, Salt, Turmeric, Mustard Oil
recipe_ingredients: Wild Greens - 1 bunch, Rice - 1 cup, Salt - to taste, Turmeric - ½ tsp, Mustard Oil - 2 tbsp
instructions: Boil rice until done. In a pan, heat mustard oil and add turmeric. Toss in chopped wild greens and stir-fry until tender. Mix with cooked rice. Adjust salt and serve.

available_ingredients: Red Lentils, Bamboo Shoots, Garlic, Ginger, Mustard Oil, Salt
recipe_ingredients: Red Lentils - 1 cup, Bamboo Shoots - ½ cup, Garlic - 5 cloves, Ginger - 1 inch, Mustard Oil - 2 tbsp, Salt - to taste
instructions: Boil red lentils until soft. Heat mustard oil in a pan, add chopped garlic and ginger. Sauté until fragrant. Add bamboo shoots and stir well. Combine with the boiled lentils and let it simmer for 10 minutes. Adjust salt and serve.

available_ingredients: Rice, Pumpkin Flowers, Mustard Oil, Salt, Turmeric, Green Chilies
recipe_ingredients: Rice - 1 cup, Pumpkin Flowers - 10, Mustard Oil - 2 tbsp, Salt - to taste, Turmeric - ½ tsp, Green Chilies - 3
instructions: Clean the pumpkin flowers, removing the pistils. Heat mustard oil, add turmeric and green chilies. Stir in the pumpkin flowers and cook until soft. Serve with steamed rice.

available_ingredients: Banana Flower, Rice Flour, Salt, Turmeric, Green Chilies, Mustard Oil
recipe_ingredients: Banana Flower - 1, Rice Flour - ½ cup, Salt - to taste, Turmeric - ½ tsp, Green Chilies - 3, Mustard Oil - 2 tbsp
instructions: Clean and chop the banana flower. Heat mustard oil in a pan, add green chilies and turmeric. Stir in the banana flower. Cook until tender, then sprinkle rice flour to thicken. Mix well and cook for another 5 minutes. Serve with rice.

available_ingredients: Wheat Flour, Cabbage, Carrot, Onion, Garlic, Ginger, Soy Sauce, Salt, Oil
recipe_ingredients: Wheat Flour - 2 cups, Cabbage - 1 cup (grated), Carrot - 1 cup (grated), Onion - 1 (chopped), Garlic - 4 cloves (minced), Ginger - 1 inch (grated), Soy Sauce - 2 tbsp, Salt - to taste, Oil - 1 tbsp
instructions: Mix wheat flour with water to form a smooth dough. For the filling, mix grated cabbage, carrot, onion, garlic, ginger, soy sauce, and salt. Roll out small circles of dough, place the filling in the center, and fold the edges. Steam for 15 minutes. Serve with chutney.

available_ingredients: Rice, Black Lentils, Fermented Bamboo Shoots, Turmeric, Mustard Oil, Salt
recipe_ingredients: Rice - 1 cup, Black Lentils - ½ cup, Fermented Bamboo Shoots - ½ cup, Turmeric - ½ tsp, Mustard Oil - 2 tbsp, Salt - to taste
instructions: Boil black lentils with turmeric and salt. Heat mustard oil, sauté bamboo shoots until aromatic. Add to the lentils and cook until the flavors blend. Serve with rice.

recipe_ingredients: Buckwheat Flour - 2 cups, Water - 1 cup, Salt - to taste, Ghee - 1 tbsp
instructions: Mix buckwheat flour with water and salt to form a batter. Heat a pan, grease with ghee, and pour the batter to form thin pancakes. Cook on both sides until golden brown. Serve with chutney or curry.

available_ingredients: Pork, Fermented Soybeans, Green Chilies, Garlic, Ginger, Salt, Mustard Oil
recipe_ingredients: Pork - 500g, Fermented Soybeans - 3 tbsp, Green Chilies - 4, Garlic - 6 cloves, Ginger - 1 inch, Salt - to taste, Mustard Oil - 3 tbsp
instructions: Heat mustard oil, add garlic, ginger, and green chilies. Sauté until fragrant. Add pork and cook until browned. Add fermented soybeans and water. Simmer until pork is tender. Serve hot.

available_ingredients: Rice, Chicken, Ginger, Garlic, Onion, Tomato, Cumin, Coriander, Salt, Oil
recipe_ingredients: Rice - 1 cup, Chicken - 250g, Ginger - 1 inch, Garlic - 4 cloves, Onion - 1, Tomato - 2, Cumin - 1 tsp, Coriander - 1 tsp, Salt - to taste, Oil - 2 tbsp
instructions: Boil chicken and shred it. Heat oil, sauté garlic, ginger, and onion. Add tomatoes, cumin, and coriander. Cook until tomatoes are soft. Add the shredded chicken and water. Simmer and serve with rice.

available_ingredients: Rice, Spinach, Tomatoes, Garlic, Ginger, Salt, Mustard Oil
recipe_ingredients: Rice - 1 cup, Spinach - 1 bunch, Tomatoes - 2, Garlic - 5 cloves, Ginger - 1 inch, Salt - to taste, Mustard Oil - 2 tbsp
instructions: Heat mustard oil, add garlic and ginger. Add chopped tomatoes and cook until soft. Add kinema (fermented soybean) and stir. Cook for 10 minutes. Add spinach and cook until wilted. Serve with rice.

available_ingredients: Rice, Green Vegetables, Fermented Bamboo Shoots, Salt, Mustard Oil
recipe_ingredients: Rice - 1 cup, Green Vegetables - 1 bunch, Fermented Bamboo Shoots - ½ cup, Salt - to taste, Mustard Oil - 2 tbsp
instructions: Heat mustard oil in a pot. Add bamboo shoots and fry until fragrant. Add chopped green vegetables and stir. Pour water and simmer for 20 minutes. Serve hot with rice.

available_ingredients: Flour, Butter, Baking Powder, Sugar, Water, Salt
recipe_ingredients: Flour - 2 cups, Butter - 2 tbsp, Baking Powder - 1 tsp, Sugar - ½ cup, Water - 1 cup, Salt - a pinch
instructions: Mix flour, sugar, salt, and baking powder. Add water gradually to form a batter. Heat oil in a deep pan. Pour batter in a circular motion to form ring shapes. Fry until golden brown. Serve as a snack.

available_ingredients: Rice Flour, Jaggery, Coconut, Cardamom Powder, Water
recipe_ingredients: Rice Flour - 1 cup, Jaggery - ½ cup, Coconut - ½ cup (grated), Cardamom Powder - ½ tsp, Water - 1 cup
instructions: Boil water and dissolve jaggery. Add rice flour slowly, stirring to avoid lumps. Add grated coconut and cardamom powder. Cook until thick. Serve as a dessert.

available_ingredients: Rice, Mutton, Garlic, Ginger, Bay Leaf, Cumin, Cloves, Salt, Ghee
recipe_ingredients: Rice - 1 cup, Mutton - 300g, Garlic - 5 cloves, Ginger - 1 inch, Bay Leaf - 2, Cumin - 1 tsp, Cloves - 3, Salt - to taste, Ghee - 2 tbsp
instructions: Heat ghee in a pan. Add bay leaf, cumin, and cloves. Sauté garlic and ginger. Add mutton and cook until tender. Serve with rice.

available_ingredients: Rice Flour, Fermented Rice, Water, Salt
recipe_ingredients: Rice Flour - 1 cup, Fermented Rice - ½ cup, Water - 2 cups, Salt - to taste
instructions: Boil water, add fermented rice and salt. Slowly add rice flour while stirring. Simmer until the soup thickens. Serve hot.

available_ingredients: Bamboo Shoots, Pork, Ginger, Garlic, Mustard Oil, Salt
recipe_ingredients: Bamboo Shoots - ½ cup, Pork - 500g, Ginger - 1 inch, Garlic - 5 cloves, Mustard Oil - 3 tbsp, Salt - to taste
instructions: vHeat mustard oil, sauté garlic and ginger. Add pork and cook until browned. Add bamboo shoots and water. Simmer until the pork is tender. Adjust salt and serve.
